name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: (Re) building our economy...

body:
We built the best economy in the world. We can do it again. No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-psptl-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psptl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,We need to **reopen** and **rebuild** America's economy.Unfortunately, the D.C. liberals have a _higher priority in mind_ : **winning in November.** They're actually _scared_ that an economic recovery could help Republicans... that's why they're trying to keep America closed!Do **YOU** believe that our jobs and economy should come **before** the Democrats' political strategy? [Join Fitz - $5](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psptl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Fitz - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psptl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) This was the headline on Fox:
> "Dems reportedly warning preelection economic surge could boost Trump"-[Fox News](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-psptl-ahkdjtlkr-t/), 5/26/20
It's wrong, and un-American, to root against our country and force small businesses to stay closed in order to give your political opponent a black eye.I'm running for Congress to **rebuild** America's economy. Will you join me?Scott Fitzgerald

I am a U.S. citizen or a lawfully admitted permanent resident, and I am not a foreign national or a federal contractor. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Amy McGrath and John Hickenlooper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
_We understand that this is a trying time for our families and our nation. We hope that you and your loved ones are safe and healthy during this pandemic. While this crisis is keeping Democrats off of the campaign trail for the time being, our fight for victory in November continues. Please only make a contribution if you are able to do so. We appreciate your support._

Team,
This November, Democrats have a real shot at taking back the Senate from the GOP.
But in order to make that happen, we need to come together and support the candidates who are running to flip the crucial seats we need to win in the fight to elect a Democratic majority.
[Are you ready to take back the Senate? Split a $5 donation to Amy McGrath, John Hickenlooper, and my campaign before the end-of-month deadline.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9df7/4fbb2af3/21918f76/5e8019f4/4044907085/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItc2VuYXRlLXNsYXRlLW1heS0yMDIwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDUyOWkiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-senate-slate-may-2020?refcode=em200529i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Amy McGrath is taking the fight to Mitch McConnell himself in the Kentucky Senate race because people in her state and across the country need real leaders who put them first.
And in Colorado, John Hickenlooper is currently ahead in the polls against the unpopular GOP incumbent -- this is a prime opportunity for turning a red seat blue in the November election.
[Pitch in $5 right now to stand with Amy, John, and me in the fight for the Senate.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409d9df7/4fbb2af3/21918f76/5e8019f4/4044907085/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoWW5CaFoyVWdmWDA9IjoianItc2VuYXRlLXNsYXRlLW1heS0yMDIwIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTIwMDUyOWkiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-senate-slate-may-2020?refcode=em200529i&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,
Jacky

name: Kyle Hupfer
subject: Breaking: Gov. Holcomb earns 79% approval rating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
If you’d take a second to help us share this exciting news | | |
---|---|---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=236aecfd0a9641e88bd4c4201bc9f7e2&_e=My7Gt--M5MNN3-eTgMidcVN9Dn-JHP8QNEjFRM2Dlxq9EJ0stMWepbMtVloOOVJM7GCqsOZEDUGnq_wenLCYJHN0PEFg2U1TPgeSGEfudEJsNqC8YalR_MV-Sa5tXsMSUsvWDjD5Op6XcVNelD7dmnOJtFSFWZQqZWsGy3-7haAlxB0EzjhM2-k3eVStM7huEsKBigB3c0hP3Q3tajt8h8Az_VCnT8834WmBJnEQN3t4XcsoQygQuJzXDZMEXGipM2htIFwEBue3nNXRtHJ3tf4rv4gMyw9sZQ72hp0Z44fMA-ClvwJabGSzL8u0Tur4wX8bfe_Y93fr7KNPILcQyANBBmxvXnEidCX8QphN_QTHobBdafM8Vy_lkZMUliQY5qbtd4cpYtaPqDUeanu97Q%3D%3D)
Friends,

BIG news today! Last week, we did a poll asking Hoosiers their thoughts on a few issues – **_and the results came back to show that Hoosiers approve of Governor Holcomb’s job serving us all by historic margins._**

The poll showed that:

* 79% approve of Governor Holcomb’s overall job performance
* 83% approve of his leadership so far during the COVID-19 pandemic

But it didn’t stop there. _**A head-to-head match-up against the presumptive Democrat nominee in November also favors Governor Holcomb in a landslide,**_ with 64% saying they’d vote for Governor Holcomb compared to 21% supporting the Democrat.

You can read more about the poll **[here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=236aecfd0a9641e88bd4c4201bc9f7e2&_e=My7Gt--M5MNN3-eTgMidcRbXKYvxDhcnfh0B-ug0WRyuZfMuNCWDESnrGSfrqq2R2yC852FMEL5LrGXqEbMIjM7uz6IYfjM0wlGWrJN8AXIDjCoDItgLQaMsfpWoortBtOJvcAY6MeKoX41xnZ_UGx4S9zhX5O8zlZR31pmlhJicneYiFR0qys4mxhnDkZ8JFCx8IYdNKpTAkhGUlWCpdl1-74qIFtzwWyOrkRx_O3xpZQIC5uapgkiu1-Jnbrq_HE2eEe9OVmV_uzTkLYh78ON-T4iUHqQjPq6NCl87vvpFAAn6umjDoqYMayVjyo-oiarG2PBnhGW-EYHp-5zdrYS52-3YX9rGm8GRTuHZRaTBZPBb11FG89MI0i5u2D8DypNxFtKPk_0S_OZyE7QIqqA2Q6iiTmDYVhm58f7_vEQA85jKB06lmMKw-V12AUWy2Ridi31-uOBWOQMYSnHGpkVW7KOv0n2RnYaiQlhsW7jeQhVyxmkCP1sFzlgDxpQA)**.

There’s no doubt – Governor Holcomb has created a special connection with Hoosiers during this crisis like we’ve never seen between an elected official and a constituency. _**That’s because Governor Holcomb knows that when you have the right policies, the politics will take care of themselves. These poll numbers show that to be the case.**_

Governor Holcomb’s steady, data-driven and compassionate leadership has resonated with Hoosiers, _**and it will keep making an impact as he continues to lead our state through this pandemic.**_

If you’d take a second to help us share this exciting news – I know together we’ll be poised to help Governor Holcomb lead for another four years:
[**Share on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=236aecfd0a9641e88bd4c4201bc9f7e2&_e=My7Gt--M5MNN3-eTgMidcURIwzTtWqd2pyLITTRomRzb3oB04ji7J8lkaInCWCr2Hey14OtXiPZXaIo1yiBy9VAbCvCLq45DlcnE-_qX5d-NoUrSOkl3pi_JO1XhUCRaXxEZnBa7hGoYXW5tlL2vjJiLP4dt8a1LdSaM_AhQYJAR26xknvCEy4wBDjTJFU8o2J9nw9byrOp3iy-91Cf2m3pAwkF7p9CBoVTIe2C-ewkBM1MERI73RTOaQrj9NrpavRYo9FVwYfQO1W7ek52XgXpiry6Q1MrLyv6V8EbwE0YxV06Bn3cMxDwttvHhOhirsc_8KnhB3OKikv3FACirLK5VLmVdGpRsSc71ZMVwcndGhkE-lKpVgndwdnGf9DpyZO-gzjcW4eqMADy8NfaNryUBnxdG7KR1yptu5tKXGuWK2rDsrujGPTwHB7xF6bD4Prpj1TQkLRh9miROHYzS1w%3D%3D)
[**Share on Twitter**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=236aecfd0a9641e88bd4c4201bc9f7e2&_e=My7Gt--M5MNN3-eTgMidcetIdV5K_iLCD-wyJrh5dhSTvq89ZV56g-Lp2-tm8gsONxl_di0VJ9yWBn5GTV0lxqU55ThfMNPgc7kYmj8BbP3UnhxOst790AK3bdljFzapn0TueKm2P4ueL56_m0boXqMqc4dlTt3A4kXFhjCwIx7NulLxnF180W0JHfNeI9ov4aLjbzlxlXv5Oomx6romJqyabBsQKYnCmaxWpsNT7RJ0jJ9I67v68-vG_hoQWDoiPEtsS_zlKNf8Hcno5AtEepRpdtYiARHfdVPupqeg5JrElKddgIUy0SKxVuNOlX8Ah8vc9JWqJqbJp_EiVxmmLwa-j4LBIWyTnbT35cq66_nsd4s9rYrVEuZx3-YIt0G8DyRggWlpq5SdofJ6ZnebbDuS-vMtAOrV0wJWCakvvrI%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Tatiana Matta Joins Moms in Office
body:
Donald Trump’s trusted ally in Congress Kevin McCarthy was challenged by Tatiana Matta in 2018, she joins Moms in Office in 2020 to elect more women. | | | |
---
|
# Tatiana's Mission is To Help Elect More Women in 2020
---
|
---
| | | [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=344a683d6a&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
###
We can't do this without you-
“Do you have enough money to buy food for your kids? Do you have enough money to buy gasoline to go to work? Do you have recreation in your town? Do you have health care? It’s about daily lives.”

These were the questions Tatiana Matta asked herself when she decided to ran for Congress and challenge Republican House Majority Leader Kevin McCarthy in 2018.

She is a military wife who was born in Puerto Rico, a mom, and an advocate for military families and veterans.

Tatiana was also the co-chair of the veterans and military families committee for former Maryland Gov. Martin O’Malley during his presidential campaign run in 2016.

She had the courage to stand up for her community and challenge Trump's closest ally and now we have her on our team to help us elect well qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know what working families are up against each day.

We can't let big dark money scare us, drown out the truth, and drown our voices.

[We need your help](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=f261362b1e&e=3f151f8b74) so we can continue to support our candidates' fight against dark money Republicans like Kevin McCarthy.

Every single contribution of any size is a sign that we are still in this fight to make America work for all of us, not just the top 5%.

---
|
---
| [Chip in! ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=871de613ed&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in! ")

Dear Friend, The Trump administration and its enablers in Congress have always preferred gaslighting to governance. As the shocking realities of a devastated economy, over 100,000 dead of COVID-19, and growing civil unrest destroy their fantasy narrative, they've decided their only route to re-election is to turn up the gas rather than deal with the problems. Do we really need another enabler in Congress? My Republican opponents proudly proclaim that they "supported President Trump 98% of the time" or that "President Trump is doing a phenomenal job for the American people." Hogwash. The failures of this administration and its enablers are plain to see. Not only _can_ we win this seat, we __must__. But we won't if we don't have the resources to keep the gaslighters from drowning us out. It's time to dig deep - especially since your contribution will be doubled \- and do a little bit more than you think can. Find the button below you're comfortable with, then click the next one up. name: Dean Browning
subject: I need your support today!
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
We are coming into the final days of our campaign. June 2nd, 2020, is Election Day. I need your support today so that I can continue this fight to the very end!
That is why I am asking for your most generous contribution possible.
I understand times are tough, but we can NOT let Lying Lisa Scheller steal this election from the people of Lehigh Valley. I urge you to max out your contribution of $2,800 today!
If you cannot make that large of a donation, then please consider donating $100, $50, or even just $25!
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bcp6wtjdF2FGkXJ2DoKgIXnpSyLnyffjpD2x_UJB_7V7dwlBqOCZxIFEicfrPZ77LmeeQsrAdrwq6ZTGVT7v-HreDnAW8ryiaN6HpPiI39YWZVW44nXmjvWEIB-hCEBjQXSodtPx9XJraj2E5BJKNetuqhXO45IchrbgVEixs8BSGpCwfXSJcQ==&c=ZLcLBdvYTm8yuZkMz98hbNEQ7XRXZE5X0x1X4defcaxr4GEl3ot32Q==&ch=XBFUZPD9KIcwsxsEG1TKqjYbKpMSRiSZTSfGqOCtMGTo6uxNAVulXA==)

| It has been a tough battle against the Establishment Queen: Liberal, Lying Lisa Scheller.
She has spent almost a million dollars on expensive D.C. Consultants to create fake narratives about me and my record.
We need to fight back!
Will you join Team Browning today with a contribution of $100?
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Bcp6wtjdF2FGkXJ2DoKgIXnpSyLnyffjpD2x_UJB_7V7dwlBqOCZxIFEicfrPZ77LmeeQsrAdrwq6ZTGVT7v-HreDnAW8ryiaN6HpPiI39YWZVW44nXmjvWEIB-hCEBjQXSodtPx9XJraj2E5BJKNetuqhXO45IchrbgVEixs8BSGpCwfXSJcQ==&c=ZLcLBdvYTm8yuZkMz98hbNEQ7XRXZE5X0x1X4defcaxr4GEl3ot32Q==&ch=XBFUZPD9KIcwsxsEG1TKqjYbKpMSRiSZTSfGqOCtMGTo6uxNAVulXA==)
---
| I look forward to earning your support and your vote on June 2nd, 2020!
For Freedom,
---
|
---
| Dean Browning Conservative Republican for Congress, PA-07
P.S. ~ We are officially counting down the days until Election Day on June 2nd! I need your financial support today!
, if you can, I urge you to make the full contribution of a limit of $2,800!
If not, please consider a donation of $100, $50, or even just $25!

name: Coalition for American Veterans
subject: Will you stand for Veterans in November?
body:
Our Vets deserve better! When you go to the polls, don’t forget about the Veterans who sacrifice so much.
| [ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVp3KF10dtJVW6dJ-Nw17S-FdW39GxQ749KJ8QN8Qx56_3lGmQV1-WJV7CgV7rW4sZ-Gn6scWm1W3m9LMF4KbRCFW1spY0q8RQ9tZW8_LVwm3H2LL4W4K6Syx2_w2p6W8KZDDt3DbKGwVGNDkz1kST2qW7PSH-66-NLmPW7xglTy2vJDPYW2_RTVJ8zhcYtVxG9-x9f6G6vW7pqNlW7-FkLvW3yVcTB6BlqbnVrVGLt72LprbVC3ZHP1X-Q5TW64tH9V302ChSVY6D9N18DfLMW3mMQPN4gqP7WW123p-l1BzNRFW59GJr05CW5pNW8R4Qp98F4k77W31Nrx86DFNPZ33SC1)
---
|
---
Hey Peter, May 2020 has been historic. As America battles the coronavirus, the tide is beginning to turn as most states are starting to safely re-open. **November 2020 is right around the corner and the presidential election is beginning to heat up.** People are even wondering whether Joe Biden will finally emerge from his home and start campaigning. For Veterans - and for every American - the 2020 presidential election will be one of the most crucial elections in American history. With vital issues such as health care, the economy, illegal immigration, national security, and the threat posed by China, we at the Coalition for American Veterans say, "It is time to stand up for our nation's Veterans!" **With your help and support, we can make a difference in the 2020 elections!** This month, we launched our informative [2020 Voter Guide.](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVp3KF10dtJVW6dJ-Nw17S-FdW39GxQ749KJ8QN8Qx57h3lGn5V1-WJV7CgRyVW4v7b3W5qtYx5W67CqvN3-vtTXW6z2fMj2H6HCFW141b4b8Z36TWW3ZK0bq7VzByVW8-G81r3DQ_7bW3_mX_5961wTpW4yxHWy5LwJQLW6Pfh_d387zbhW3FPbxy6j0hSXN95BF8tq3cDZW6ZbtrR4tk4ZSW40nNWT1D1XrsW2y3wP51P_vn_W2T68yj3wTBwwW61WP9c7cDtmhMZ7HqDh59NLW73TBxw4zfjy4W8QS-v-3JSz5XW6cqDrz2xZy76W8cm1h47dGNppVcrVTR2ys1SrW8WjsRD8w_V4sVGRjSd1BcfMb3hmG1) Politicians need to be held accountable, and this Voter Guide will help you pressure political candidates and elected officials to support the brave men and women who have sacrificed so much to defend America. **Our goal, with your support, is to distribute the Voter Guide to over 500,000 voters between now and November.** In May we launched our ["Pledge to Support Veterans"](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVp3KF10dtJVW6dJ-Nw17S-FdW39GxQ749KJ8QN8Qx57h3lGn5V1-WJV7CgVBRW60_Q022WmZjnW4lbg9L438zSLW9ktxzG1_vylSN4-C_DsQvC6PW7pDhXB8RJhhsW34yk1D4_gbjqW5BT9XG6v0T_RW3yHTHj6pBkzmW22j28259Rw7GW6lPqY442msPJW9hRZHh33Gl4yW4LCwKB3VLH-yV6bby-3PCCk4MwgtVDMg97RW8T5SV86d1zNHW16XpHz2L0PRhW8FznTt3YJfJgW2cpPTr38bWqcVTdB_46BNs4pW7l0kBr2XWsYSW9d9r7J4cd6nDW8Wvq8C8nWjd4W9j3Lgn5c7295W6sL9705xRzzC1B1) which has been signed by over 1500 Americans in the past week. Help us spread the word - sign the [Pledge](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVp3KF10dtJVW6dJ-Nw17S-FdW39GxQ749KJ8QN8Qx57h3lGn5V1-WJV7CgC_qW18qqLV3WHDk_W8z0tnp5XfDFQVvRvwL89jW5nN3vK-WQ5PFlkV2NzMp7lcBV0W9gWnHn7CQ0WDW5f8r5W9k0vXzW221fqH8NchBTW8sJwc61wt39BW2prw0V1zYh9mW5Jlymw1k0n0mW3SwnZV5FgMNcMk9MYqqRG88W8DQ8gz5-h8TTW1_xz7d3MNgjlW2-9GNC4LrY5HW8PkNNV2P01cxW1hlqLG6VWjvNVXsppl5tL8mYW22RrFS29f8sjW1QtMk86qxp07W7Y_w3P5zVwLBW2bbSpT1_6LkDW1M4zQq1m3_xj2Yl1) and share it with your friends and family on Facebook. In June and throughout the summer, our voter outreach efforts will continue. **We will be reminding voters how bad it was during the Obama-Biden Administration with its disrespect, neglect, and mistreatment of our nation’s Veterans.** We will be standing up in support of Veterans, registering voters, holding politicians accountable, and educating the public about issues of concern to Veterans. **Your support is crucial.** From now through November, via videos, social media, phone calls, mailings, text messages, email alerts, and literature distribution, the Coalition for American Veterans will be rallying our grassroots troops to stand up for Veterans' issues, working to expose and defeat candidates who are not supportive of our Veterans. **Thanks for your support!** PS: Are you on "Team Vets"? [Join us now with a donation of $35.](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VVp3KF10dtJVW6dJ-Nw17S-FdW39GxQ749KJ8QN8Qx57h3lGn5V1-WJV7CgXPxW5d7qg05Y14R6W8--HWC8tjt65W4rY8Zm3cx27_VqQZ7d6974xcW6L47P_7qKxFZW1LVJVt1ryJ92N6ry8NM3qPfYVg949N6Z4-XvW7fPSZY46K5hZW1vb_-j4nNl_lW6hBzzk8BVqw6N4yKzyTk-TR0W8fSK4l2dBW_-W8xvfpq6cVHn1W6ymRDb5XJvxFW4sm6y38tQzvkW9f1Cys7LmSnwN83LXlHZM0zvW5L8wBY6NpBDJW3D58Wj24vqJJW8mPb8y2wdP8PW3VKhtz59sHQjW6V3xPc4LsB0bW6h6SDp1TM3Xh33n81)

clean_body: Our Vets deserve better! When you go to the polls, don’t forget about the Veterans who sacrifice so much. | | Hey Peter, May 2020 has been historic. As America battles the coronavirus, the tide is beginning to turn as most states are starting to safely re-open. November 2020 is right around the corner and the presidential election is beginning to heat up. People are even wondering whether Joe Biden will finally emerge from his home and start campaigning. For Veterans - and for every American - the 2020 presidential election will be one of the most crucial elections in American history. With vital issues such as health care, the economy, illegal immigration, national security, and the threat posed by China, we at the Coalition for American Veterans say, "It is time to stand up for our nation's Veterans!" With your help and support, we can make a difference in the 2020 elections! This month, we launched our informative Politicians need to be held accountable, and this Voter Guide will help you pressure political candidates and elected officials to support the brave men and women who have sacrificed so much to defend America. Our goal, with your support, is to distribute the Voter Guide to over 500,000 voters between now and November. In May we launched our which has been signed by over 1500 Americans in the past week. Help us spread the word - sign the and share it with your friends and family on Facebook. In June and throughout the summer, our voter outreach efforts will continue. We will be reminding voters how bad it was during the Obama-Biden Administration with its disrespect, neglect, and mistreatment of our nation’s Veterans. We will be standing up in support of Veterans, registering voters, holding politicians accountable, and educating the public about issues of concern to Veterans. Your support is crucial. From now through November, via videos, social media, phone calls, mailings, text messages, email alerts, and literature distribution, the Coalition for American Veterans will be rallying our grassroots troops to stand up for Veterans' issues, working to expose and defeat candidates who are not supportive of our Veterans. name: Shayne Cheshire
subject: A BOLD endorsement!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s thanks to the grassroots members of our team who have shown they believe in Margaret and are ready to do what it takes to flip this seat that our campaign continues to get national attention. Progressive groups are watching this race, which is why I’m so proud to announce Margaret’s latest endorsement from BOLD PAC.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685574/202812997/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=&emci=de3d0a4b-80a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=02b6d6ef-80a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

One of my favorite things about this campaign is the fact that it’s powered by people: grassroots supporters from around Southwest Florida and across the country who want to send bold, new leadership to Washington.

It’s thanks to the grassroots members of our team who have shown they believe in Margaret and are ready to do what it takes to flip this seat that our campaign continues to get national attention. Progressive groups are watching this race, which is why I’m so proud to announce Margaret’s latest endorsement from BOLD PAC.

They understand that Margaret’s leadership in Washington will be an asset, and her creative approach to solving problems is desperately needed.

**[This endorsement is just the latest example of the strength of our campaign — but we can’t afford to slow down. One of the best ways to support the campaign and help us continue the momentum is to pledge a sustaining contribution to ensure Margaret has the resources she needs to win this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685577/202813000/788213855?refcode=em05302020&amount=%2425&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=)**

But, as we make gains in our district and across the country, we know the GOP is closely watching us.

It’s why we don’t take any of these endorsements for granted and why grassroots support for this campaign is critical.

We rely on contributions from supporters like you so we have the resources it takes to respond to the inevitable attacks from the GOP.

**[Please, make a contribution today to ensure we have the necessary resources to flip this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685579/202813002/788213855?refcode=em05302020&amount=%2425&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=)**

All of us on Team Good are so appreciative of your support.

Thank you,

Shayne Cheshire
Finance Director
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685581/202813004/788213855?refcode=em05302020&amount=%2425&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685582/202813005/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17685584/202813007/192916899?contactdata=ptTugZnAwUQtuXTLy%2FgP0HKOCRTxjRiYCrCQJoNrvEB1jhF%2Fu7dYB7SDCT7Ph0hV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmI2ZDZlZi04MGEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I00n-hzEc6fGmi6z7q_U8VcJAqAPtG72rP-PO_kPPrA=&emci=de3d0a4b-80a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=02b6d6ef-80a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=9814644)**

name: Adam, Me (2)
subject: fwd: Eugene needs your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
I need to make sure you saw this note from Adam Schiff yesterday. If anyone knows how much is on the line this November, it’s him, and I am so grateful to have his support in our race.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

I need to make sure you saw this note from Adam Schiff yesterday. If anyone knows how much is on the line this November, it’s him, and I am so grateful to have his support in our race.

# Patriots!
---
We are proud to announce our endorsement of Raul Reyes for Congress in the Texas Congressional Seat of District 23. Our PAC fully endorses Raul and we know that a vote for his opponent is a vote against our President. Do not be fooled by candidates that are telling you they are for our President. The outgoing Congressman Will Hurd's voting record is only at 27% conservative. Will Hurd has been voting with Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist communist elected officials. Now Will Hurd has chosen a protege Tony Gonzales. Patriots DO NOT let this man become the representative that will vote against America First. We need YOU! Please contact raulreyesforcongress.com donate, sign up to phone bank, blockwalk, or to become a social media influencer for Raul Reyes. Our President is counting on YOU to send him the right Congressman to office. We know that you are loyal to our President. this is why we are writing to YOU. This is an urgent matter. Early Voting begins July 6 through the 10th and Election Day in Congressional District 23 is July 14th. We need ALL hands on deck!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Explosive coverage of Rikin Mehta as "Hard Democrat"!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
It's undeniable — GOP datasets don't lie. |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1836061d02&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,

You know the saying about rats and sinking ships.

Ever since President Trump's victory, the Democrat Party has been getting increasingly desperate. And with the 2020 election coming up, they're doing _everything_ they can to sabotage their rivals — **including infiltration.**

Well, we're not gonna fall for it. From the [Shore News Network](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=065bf05007&e=3e017fab0f):
---
| |
## RNC Insider Candidate Profile Shows Rikin Mehta as “Hard Democrat”

_...in the GOP candidate profile database, the [Republican] party identifies Mehta as a “**Hard Democrat** ”. Screenshots published to the internet this week, which were confirmed as accurate, from the GOP Data Center show Mehta’s **secret file that is on record at the RNC.**_
---
| [STOP RINOS NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=aaefceeb66&e=3e017fab0f "STOP RINOS NOW")
---
| From the moment Rikin Mehta entered the race, Republicans from all over New Jersey have seen this charade for what it is — **a Trojan Horse to keep Cory Booker in power.**

## This makes Rikin Mehta _extremely_ dangerous to uninformed patriots. They don't know that _**voting for Mehta means voting for Booker.**_ That's what the Democrats will be counting on.

Well now, with this bombshell report, we have _direct_ evidence that shows Rikin Mehta for what he is. A Big Pharma executive, a former Obama official and donor... and a **Hard Democrat**.

Unlike Mehta or Booker, the same report gives us one more finding: **_"Hirsh Singh, Mehta’s opponent in July, also has a record in the GOP database and clearly identified Singh as a 'Hard Republican'."_**

The coming November elections will be a battle to save New Jersey from another reign of terror, headed by Cory Booker.

It's critical that we get the word out, so voters can be informed: **A vote for Mehta is a vote for Booker.**

Thank you for fighting to save New Jersey.

Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**

_For the People_
Republican for U.S. Senate
---
|
---
| [EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=e9536bfdb8&e=3e017fab0f "EVERY EFFORT COUNTS — FIGHT BACK NOW")

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Friend,

Can you help us meet our end of month goal? We’re $4,820 short right now and only have until midnight tomorrow. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Donald Trump is tearing this country apart. We’ve lost more American lives to Covid-19 than Vietnam and Korea combined – and still GOP leadership is calling the pandemic liberal propaganda. Trump is spreading lies about mail-in ballots. Trump is calling for more violence in the Minnesota riots. He's turning a blind eye to hate and racism. He will do whatever it takes to fire up his base and he needs to be stopped.

That’s why the WVDP is fighting so hard. That’s why we’re pooling all our resources together to make sure that all votes are counted safely and fairly. We’re mobilizing Democrats throughout West Virginia and we’re not going to stop.

Will you make a donation right now and help us? America cannot afford 4 more years of this. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Thank you so much!
Belinda Biafore, Chair, WVDP

| Peter,
This week, Colin Allred and his Democrat colleagues sent a letter to Governor Abbott in which they said possibly the most tone deaf thing to ever come out of a Democrat's mouth:
"We all believe in raising property taxes." \- TX Congressional Democrats
Now all of us probably assumed that the Democrats wanted to raise our property taxes, but rarely are they so open about it. [Stand with me to oppose them!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001spZvoxHCFzDtfKeMFXOE55Mqdcf9YGy5wcXVdbcqzwH3MO24R3fqQ5GR0vGRdHqSmrXr3hkgxDpRdazaJD51kJ0boNMSMjO8PIvEAEqs5AmI9JLEed6DS_Y9jOVVdPMKLGgO41YHSP4eJ99FWn81Y0MCUB7wh-leF2dPnOkPhE6i6ynsJHcRnw==&c=MmhxOrDvdeTJwP6uaC6R-pLu2mAckfwcNMqxbM8rQHDeIu3MHaEPPw==&ch=qLRU23eSITlYcsd2lr8HkBlvVQgexlNwA6zRIQS-WtLbSh1A5cKSKA==)
This is what we're up against. On one side we have people who do not believe your hard earned money or your property belong to you.
On the other hand, I believe that that the money you earn belongs to you, and that your property is not an unlimited source of government revenue. If you agree with me, [please contribute to my campaign right now](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001spZvoxHCFzDtfKeMFXOE55Mqdcf9YGy5wcXVdbcqzwH3MO24R3fqQ5GR0vGRdHqSmrXr3hkgxDpRdazaJD51kJ0boNMSMjO8PIvEAEqs5AmI9JLEed6DS_Y9jOVVdPMKLGgO41YHSP4eJ99FWn81Y0MCUB7wh-leF2dPnOkPhE6i6ynsJHcRnw==&c=MmhxOrDvdeTJwP6uaC6R-pLu2mAckfwcNMqxbM8rQHDeIu3MHaEPPw==&ch=qLRU23eSITlYcsd2lr8HkBlvVQgexlNwA6zRIQS-WtLbSh1A5cKSKA==), and let's take this seat back!

name: Team Tina
subject: Our community needs you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend — communities across the nation are reeling from the last week. Over the last 15 hours, we’ve seen the pain and anger of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, and so many other murders pour from protest to riots. We are all hurting and looking for ways to begin the healing. There are so many local organizations that are doing important work to support communities of color during this painful time. We would love your help uplifting these causes. If you’ve been watching the news coverage and wondering what you could do to help, this is an opportunity to make an impact and work toward long-lasting change. We encourage folks to donate to We Love Lake Street, an organization focused on helping small businesses and nonprofits in the Lake Street community rebuild their storefronts and serve their neighborhoods. A majority of businesses in the Lake Street community are owned by immigrants and people of color. We also want to direct people to contribute to Minnesota Voice. This organization is committed to working toward racial, social, and economic justice by increasing civic engagement in underrepresented communities across Minnesota. **[Can you donate whatever you can to help We Love Lake Street and Minnesota Voice today? These organizations are doing important work in their communities and need our support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17688387/202861050/80862072?refcode=em200530-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjODRkOS05MWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgbBOnQ5HeBro-cFi06G9Gf5wcWAWGA0VWp5BBUa03s=)** | [Contribute now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17688388/202861051/80862072?refcode=em200530-charity&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDJjODRkOS05MWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgbBOnQ5HeBro-cFi06G9Gf5wcWAWGA0VWp5BBUa03s=)
---
We know this is a tough time for folks, so please only give if you can. We are always amazed by the generosity and selflessness of this team.
Thank you, as always, for taking action.
— Team Tina
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States

name: Paul Davis
subject: The representation Kansans deserve
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because Michelle De La Isla is the different kind of leader Kansans need fighting for them in Congress.
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

As a lifelong Kansan, I care greatly about this state and the people that live here. That's why I decided to run for Kansas' 2nd District in 2018 - to fight for my friends, family, and neighbors who were being let down by politicians in Washington D.C.

I came within less than a percentage point of defeating my opponent, and it was clear families all across the district were ready for change. But two years later, Kansans are still feeling the same fear, frustration, and disappointment from their representation.

I'm reaching out to you today because Michelle De La Isla is the different kind of leader Kansans need fighting for them in Congress. She understands the problems we face because she's faced them too. Now, she's ready to lift up all of our voices in Congress and fight for the issues that matter most to us.

**[But she can't win without our help. Will you chip in $10 or more to join me in supporting Michelle's campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17688442/202863839/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTU5MzRjZS05MmEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqtPm533XX2KOlEgO8IaYbHkzZYguijjRudA8LuqgBo=)**

I learned so much throughout my time on the campaign trail. Traveling the district, I visited all 25 counties and talked with countless Kansans about the issues on their minds, their priorities, and what they're looking for from their leaders.

The time I spent talking to Kansans is why I am so confident in saying that Michelle has both the experience and leadership qualities that we deserve to have representing us in Congress.

Look -- I'm all-in on Michelle's campaign, but she needs our help to win. This district will once again be one of the most competitive in the country, and Michelle isn't taking any corporate PAC money. That means she's counting on grassroots supporters to step up and help ensure she has the resources she needs to win.

**[Join me in supporting Michelle's campaign for Congress by chipping in $10 or more right away.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17688443/202863840/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTU5MzRjZS05MmEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqtPm533XX2KOlEgO8IaYbHkzZYguijjRudA8LuqgBo=)**

Thanks,

Paul

**Michelle De La Isla is running for Congress to fight for families across KS-02. We understand that you may have other financial priorities during this challenging time. While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can.**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17688444/202863841/-2120508223?gpsid=8_122_13175&refcode=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200530_eom3_fnd_gq_ful__pd_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTU5MzRjZS05MmEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZqtPm533XX2KOlEgO8IaYbHkzZYguijjRudA8LuqgBo=)

While we would greatly appreciate your support, please only contribute what you can. = PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS Michelle for Kansas PO Box 67101 Topeka, KS 66667 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Dani?=
subject: An important deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
We have less than 48 hours to raise $5,437 to fill our budget gap. |
---
| |
---
| |
#
> | | | | _At a time when a lot of Americans are dealing with economic uncertainty, we completely understand if you cannot afford to donate right now. Stay safe. Let's get through this together_
> ---
| Our end-of-month deadline for May is approaching, and we need your help to get us to our monthly goal. **We have until Sunday, May 31st to raise $5,437 and close the gap.** This is doable if we can count on your help.
---
| [Donate here to help us close the gap!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9986a1df8a&e=140a9b81e7 "Donate here to help us close the gap!")
---
| Our Republican opponent has a massive war chest, and hitting this goal is the only way that we can compete in this election. That's where you come in.

We have gained so much momentum, and we can't afford to slow down now.[ **If you can, please chip in to help us close the gap. Every donation puts us closer to our goal. **](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1d1aca007c&e=140a9b81e7)

**Dani is going to be the strong, progressive voice that we deserve in Congress**. You can count on her to fight for our values. Can we count on you to help get her there?******Chip in $5, $20, $100 or whatever you can to help us meet this crucial goal. **

Your support means the world to us. Supporters like you will lead us to victory in November.

Team Dani

body:
we need Claudia to win back the House [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dd259994d5f340bba5e02f91e894ede2&_e=EFfZ10jtTzR6PoXIH9mk9-9RraALfMDA4-KIA1CEP-ZWJADu1el7H37RVLm7M7Yg3yBJ_Eoydg7PXSDKzIE_XIqgIDgYDRjmuwXqevcy5PwIs8OrbCeScXEbwRxjSERCCmzL8b0lVfad_NrouD9WO2U8ExqOr1m7hYgMM44XmsEhvDLiUU0XHPG8KWIxIRw6gn15BZplkUXbOvGMkxKBr0yVIl1cPT3u8Q7wAvn_7NxWvjvrn5fCXMvzEHEZDOTrR94Rx83zUffbh0n-bMKWGfEr0Ig5-0f1YJKNhsnG7sjjb2QSIKfJLJLC7D-GL9Jy3dcDnwZXR0cto7JTlLKQSzW4QiYsmWPPEy2xGsq4wGXQEKa6uMlYBTUCxWY0BYQZqm7U0JF4zk5r1KKcio0jvMjwPeIC1m1fe1ndz4Jr0egJKYoYTYtB589TfO_mEpIZ) [**JOIN ELISE STEFANIK: CHIP IN NOW**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=dd259994d5f340bba5e02f91e894ede2&_e=EFfZ10jtTzR6PoXIH9mk9-9RraALfMDA4-KIA1CEP-ZWJADu1el7H37RVLm7M7Yg3yBJ_Eoydg7PXSDKzIE_XIqgIDgYDRjmuwXqevcy5PwIs8OrbCeScXEbwRxjSERCCmzL8b0lVfad_NrouD9WO2U8ExqOr1m7hYgMM44XmsEhvDLiUU0XHPG8KWIxIRw6gn15BZplkUXbOvGMkxKBr6frGTR20lSt-LGg6S72bMP4hc_LPuCQ2jgKBTrjAxgBI0nMRrVpyPm7UwgLfHvGMhpM_t-546iiRedngn7r8WrUvTJaYiLyd1V2EmRVfjYmtZotXO3zy2Z6I4oTOj49_IdlI_RiMd9CFJbmcZI2cwAtlsW8sJORgp_5qBzsfr8tihiV5cM6xwf54o7WliM49KmOvsdkzU9vqZb2KFSrBPdcNzS5RB5WFckLzi-C2Od9) Peter, In 2018 it was the Republican Party that lost the majority in the House of Representatives - but for the last two years, every American has been paying for it.

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17689836/202888529/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmZhYWYzOS05Y2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chvUPT_iFy0sE5FwtiR1B6qiTMumn_WcA_TKvnoQNNA=&emci=df7ac74a-93a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=9bfaaf39-9ca2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

**I wanted to take a moment to explain why meeting our end-of-month fundraising goal is so important, team.**

**First,** early money matters a lot in competitive races like ours. It allows us to invest quickly in the infrastructure we need to build lasting relationships with our community and win. And we’re prioritizing community building on this campaign: **we’re building and maintaining a fully digital campaign, getting communities impacted by COVID-19 access to necessary resources, and reaching out to voters on the phone, through the mail, and on the air.**

**Second,****** our campaign is up against a whole host of far-right interests. **We’re running a grassroots campaign focused on the issues in TX-22 and supported by folks just like yourself.** Our opponents have let corporations know they’re for sale and stoking the flames of division in our country.

To combat those interests, fight for our values, and build a campaign that can win, **we need you.**

Experts have declared this race a toss-up, and that means we need all hands on deck to ensure we can move forward and win. [**So, if you’re able, chip in and help us win this race and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17689843/202888536/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.05.30_mG_b1_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmZhYWYzOS05Y2EyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chvUPT_iFy0sE5FwtiR1B6qiTMumn_WcA_TKvnoQNNA=)

_Matt Gaze_

clean_body: Yesterday our team reached out to you with the amount we need to meet our important end-of-month fundraising deadline. I’m pleased to report that since that email, we’ve gotten much closer to closing our gap -- but we’re still just a little over $4,000 short of our goal. = | Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas. Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. Team: Yesterday our team reached out to you with the amount we need to meet our important end-of-month fundraising deadline. I’m pleased to report that since that email, we’ve gotten much closer to closing our gap -- but we’re still just a little over $4,000 short of our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = I wanted to take a moment to explain why meeting our end-of-month fundraising goal is so important, team. First, early money matters a lot in competitive races like ours. It allows us to invest quickly in the infrastructure we need to build lasting relationships with our community and win. And we’re prioritizing community building on this campaign: we’re building and maintaining a fully digital campaign, getting communities impacted by COVID-19 access to necessary resources, and reaching out to voters on the phone, through the mail, and on the air. Second,**** our campaign is up against a whole host of far-right interests. We’re running a grassroots campaign focused on the issues in TX-22 and supported by folks just like yourself. Our opponents have let corporations know they’re for sale and stoking the flames of division in our country. To combat those interests, fight for our values, and build a campaign that can win, we need you. Experts have declared this race a toss-up, and that means we need all hands on deck to ensure we can move forward and win. = = Let’s get to work, Matt Gaze Finance Director Sri 2020 | = Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. name: Todd Cheewing
subject: Corky is matching donations!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Our May 31st deadline is approaching, and we are working around the clock! Help hit our goal with your support. Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/c6e87be2eadc5b98c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, I’m working 80 hours a week to help elect Corky Messner to the Senate, but we’re not going to get Jeanne Shaheen out of office without your help. We’ve been relying exclusively on online support ever since we began social distancing to stop the spread of COVID-19. We need to raise $12,580 before May 31st in order to reach the maximum number of voters online to defeat DC Jeanne. I believe in Corky because he’s not a career politician. He’s the sort of straight-talking, no-nonsense individual who will put Granite Staters first in Washington, and not play political games like Jeanne Shaheen. Corky’s real-world experience means he will never let New Hampshire citizens needlessly suffer like Senator Shaheen did for weeks by blindly following Democrat leaders Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer and refusing to replenish the popular Paycheck Protection Program. I’m getting ready to send Corky an update on our latest donors, and I want to add your name to our recent push. To show how committed he is to serving you in Congress, **Corky is personally matching all donations to the end of the month!** _**MATCHING DONOR STATUS**_
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com** **STATUS:** **MISSING** **[DONATE NOW>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/8307d46635210127c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** Our team understands that times are tough for everyone, so _please only give if you’re able to do so right now_. But if you can, there’s never been a more important time to contribute and flip this seat RED in 2020. **We need to raise $12,580 before the end of the month to prepare for our latest campaign mailers and ads. If we don’t, we very well may lose**. [**Will you donate today and double your impact, Peter?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/945cc9633ddfe57ac3d6b838967d376c/33153) Thanks for your support! \- Todd Cheewing, Team Corky For Senate **[Contribute $5>>> Make a $10 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/747bcfcbf323ff6fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) **
**[Contribute $15>>> Make a $30 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/237692aea0c07cf6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

**[Contribute $50>>> Make a $100 Impact](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/07f1681e77ead4fe/7dc7d5695e19e2b1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

name: Bruce, Campaign Manager
subject: Re: Building a new strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We're taking our voter registration strategy online to make sure that every Virginian has the opportunity to cast their ballot this November.
|
---
| | Derek --

I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Team Warner earlier this month.

Voter registration is a cornerstone of our campaign operation, and it's crucial to making sure Mark Warner wins re-election in November. **The unfortunate truth is that Virginia voter registration has dropped dramatically since the coronavirus outbreak began.** As we face our end of month fundraising deadlines, I'm focused on making sure we have the resources to expand our voter registration efforts next month.

**[If you are able to support our voter registration efforts, please consider donating today.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ad2/2619623414/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** We need to ensure that every eligible voter is registered and has an opportunity to cast a ballot this fall. **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ad1/2619623414/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ad0/2619623414/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887adf/2619623414/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ade/2619623414/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887add/2619623414/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887adc/2619623414/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** Thank you for for your support,

-- Bruce, Campaign Manager

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: Warner for Virginia
Subject: Building a new strategy
> | [We're building a new voter registration strategy](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887adb/2619623414/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")
> ---
>
>
> Derek --
>
> These days, we're all doing things differently to keep our communities safer and healthier: putting off travel plans, staying home as much as possible, and wearing face coverings in public. We're also looking for new ways to safely connect with voters.
>
> For example, a few months ago we had volunteers ready to fan out across the Commonwealth to knock on doors and register record numbers of new voters -- this was a critical part of our winning strategy. But since we've been practicing physical distancing, voter registration numbers in Virginia (and across the country) are way below what we were hoping. In this chart, the red line is new voter registrations in 2020, and you can see the sudden drop in April.
> [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ada/2619623414/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
> ---
> _Source: VPAP.org, 4/30/20_
> We're already shifting our campaign online: offering volunteering opportunities, moving town hall events online, and connecting with our supporters weekly to make sure they have the information and resources they need. **Now, we 're taking our voter registration strategy online, to make sure that every Virginian has the opportunity to cast their ballot this November.**
>
> **[We need your help-- if you're able, will you make a donation to support our voter registration operation?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ad9/2619623414/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**
>
> Everyone on Team Warner is working hard to keep this campaign going strong. Mark and the entire team were looking forward to traveling across Virginia to talk to constituents about the issues that matter in their communities. We're disappointed that we've had to put that on hold for now, but we're turning our attention to making sure everyone has the opportunity to cast their ballot and make their voice heard. It's more important than ever for our campaign to reach folks online.
>
> **[If you're able, will you contribute now to help us fund a new strategy and move our campaign online?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ad8/2619623414/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=ask4&amount=5")**
>
> We're focused on sending Mark back to the Senate so he can keep fighting for us. Thank you so much for your support.
>
> -- Team Warner
>
>
>
> **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ac7/2619623414/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-voterregistration?refcode=20200530_f_1_nd__600__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d477/53d9897e/548d2634/1c887ac6/2619623414/VEsHBg/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: We need Brian
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
Having served our nation as a Navy SEAL and deploying five times to protect our nation, I have dedicated my life to keeping America safe. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=fdb6b55934ca4cd7ae04d3c60a36cacc&_e=0wQv0UwafNeIzwkKUEwOa4arelmSSvTKj7V0hbd3cAGf4jKZWxzAtOiRztRa_-_9aJTzyWaZlQz-__vQWaGg1j03uKJVb7d8JIcfolnpBgk3Sh-uisiMhFpMLgkv8jPXDrP3Cf0poEPM35uhtBWZGjcV907c1CtO2B0gMxEsIgCVFKDXbUJB5DQrIaRbt9WeWpHxl7c4JGJn4iiYf4by74fFXNMO3sSo44APSgm_ViovjQ_6TGOq4z1graXVXYwaYMb7n81TeBEfyWmMlwmCOUUtfc-ztduq8wjyNOzs0QwmnwLRvlNNX7tHIKcwFujzuihhZQRVkK1aNLO8hCdqEw%3D%3D) Friend, Having served our nation as a Navy SEAL and deploying five times to protect our nation, I have dedicated my life to keeping America safe. The COVID-19 crisis has brought to light a national security threat that has gone undetected for far too long: the Communist Party of China. Their manipulation and abuses have taken many forms and have been occurring for years. They’ve even gone so far as to threaten Members of Congress who speak out against their abuses. It’s time for it to stop. My friend, Brian Fitzpatrick, has joined me and has been my partner in this fight. Together, we have called for bringing our medical and pharmaceutical supply chain back to the United States, and to hold China financially accountable for losses incurred as a result of their recklessness. Will you join us in this mission? For us to succeed, we need Brian in Congress. As an FBI Agent who served in Iraq, his voice and perspective are critically needed if we are to succeed. We need his voice now more than ever. [**Stand with Dan and Brian**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=fdb6b55934ca4cd7ae04d3c60a36cacc&_e=0wQv0UwafNeIzwkKUEwOa4arelmSSvTKj7V0hbd3cAGf4jKZWxzAtOiRztRa_-_9aJTzyWaZlQz-__vQWaGg1j03uKJVb7d8JIcfolnpBgnp8kQ0pI_YrJNaY0hd1kE24lAXOIQ9oa0Ka8QFU11VqJav-gFhF1ECkIb6VfJ3tA4Sb3rZO50ED1MdhIn8U6mEuvsS55xNaqEXT1v8uZg5nh7SXWAdwudfX6Y0EpOU31W1yknvRRZYNmIjmhI3H_v8s4hF-6q4aIXYb3uzh1YylM-S_3jskHn5u93AcxLEn4sU2LVtawWg1Mx1iUoFzXPzJFD5eJAwW09x2y0_6zpyvw%3D%3D)
I ask that you join me in supporting Brian on June 2nd. Yours in service, Dan Crenshaw

Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress

Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
PO Box 939
Langhorne, PA 19047
This email is sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress. Hoosier Republican,

As you’ve probably guessed from our previous emails, we’re working hard to keep Indiana’s 5th Congressional District from falling into the Democrats’ hands.

It’s considered one of the KEY battleground races in 2020, and if we have any hope of flipping the House, we can’t lose this seat.

We’re pushing to raise funds specifically to fight Nancy Pelosi’s liberal machine from stealing this election.

Will you chip in to help us keep this seat RED? (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/pg-cdfr3-052220?utm_source=email_PG&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=This_race_is_key_to_flipping_the_House&amount=&mc_cid=d143ffb7e3&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

Liberals know how important this seat is, and they’re pouring in out-of-state resources to try and steal it. We cannot let that happen!

Once the primary is over and we have a Republican nominee, it’s critical that we have these funds ready to support him or her from Day One.

We’ve been through enough in the past two months to know how important it is to elect a new conservative majority in Washington. Speaker Pelosi is drunk on her own power, and she’s not going to stop until we flip the House and make her stand down.

But she can't win this fight alone. This is a top-targeted race and is going to be one of the toughest in the country. _That 's why your support is so critical, especially right before a deadline as important as this._
| Most of our donations come from dedicated conservatives like you chipping in whatever they can. Our average online donation is $23, but even $1 gets us one step closer to victory. Your continued support and generosity keep our momentum building and prevent the Democrat's from buying this seat out from under us. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: This will decide the 2020 races
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is one of the most consequential elections in our history. Can I count on you to join the fight and help defend our country from a Socialist takeover?

Friend,

Democrats are desperate for power. They will say and do just about anything - even block emergency relief funding for Americans and small business to destroy our Senate Majority and take back the White House in November.

**Time is running out for you to make a difference in the 2020 election.** We are coming up on the critical End of Month deadline, and Republicans are STILL missing your support. [**Rush $25 or more to defend President Trump 's Senate Majority and it will be 5X MATCHED.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001eyZ1y4t6oQBDqK6cpQjdvNLuFGymqF43_UbQLU8nUjvdTzbR8ncXVndsYaaJuJc1CYK3jxZ1QBLzWADPwl6WUQO0eFkXJa6ff6lhkzdym1XJd4Z6UClHyRFbvD408GfwzxxUkzpRNWe1Who99SFigLSjfPRoYJqiuTvHDd--Kkixoa-M0Dm2BMz7_OO_fVG8XMb34l_-h5WoWBXUuVE-tzagtZZC-O2AQGcVqLmba5WlqdvqNUaq6ivxHGle7ok4yav9ZK4as_OjqG-YoVEgKzLjC8L4bfGsGLepTNkabU4ohFmshQWcmjlgGbRhUGd05YFDI5n_3tJEFCgJSuv7BVDNwBVlz2hGBs1ZtthKLExaf3g_kUSPikhcnn7PNTOIgV09IV-6RPtNw2s2-qjOje-1mjS8nNYKFpZMpP4B-Lpqm6tCWbE6eg==&c=sYADbIQd-h9Yrd2pUVQqGEEGfgJKY751jaPEaLIcpZHn6v1OHtJxiA==&ch=DKvTPS-xkEbe4W1KERDV1GidZbFcrCVx2hf-NNd1k_g2Sxd_LNF2LQ==)

This fight is too important for patriotic Americans to sit out. A Senate led by Chuck Schumer will be catastrophic for this country and open the door for radical Socialism. If Democrats succeed in November, it won't just be the end of the MAGA agenda, it'll be a major turning point for our country.

Friend, Democrats are desperate for power. They will say and do just about anything - even block emergency relief funding for Americans and small business to destroy our Senate Majority and take back the White House in November. Time is running out for you to make a difference in the 2020 election. We are coming up on the critical End of Month deadline, and Republicans are STILL missing your support. == This fight is too important for patriotic Americans to sit out. A Senate led by Chuck Schumer will be catastrophic for this country and open the door for radical Socialism. body:
Our race is starting to heat up, and the radical Left is taking notice. Every fundraising deadline for the next six months will be just as important as the last as National Democrats have begun throwing more money and more endorsements at Cory's leftwing challengers, including failed presidential candidate John Hickenlooper.
_Cory Gardner is a fifth generation Coloradan whose 2014 Senate victory was a watershed moment on behalf of Republicans nationwide. Cory 's win proved that similar to the rest of the country, Coloradans were fed up with the Democrats' empty promises. And in the last six years, Cory has tirelessly fought to uplift his fellow Americans through pro-growth policies and common-sense legislating.

And this year, Cory is facing another critical Battleground Election. National Democrats are investing millions in Colorado to flip the Senate from red to blue._

**[Donate Now](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10")****
---
Y'all -- have you seen what Sen. Cornyn has been up to for the last couple months?
* Sen. Cornyn foisted blame for COVID-19 fatalities onto patients who have pre-existing conditions -- instead of fighting for their well being. ([**Donate here to replace him with a senator who'll fight for you.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10"))

* He blamed Chinese culture for the coronavirus in a xenophobic tweet -- instead of taking action to save American lives and mitigate the threat we face. ([**If you're sick of hearing Sen. Cornyn lashing out instead of leading, click here.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10"))

* And he has stayed suspiciously silent while his political allies push a lawsuit that would take away health care coverage from almost 2 million Texans with pre-existing conditions -- _in the middle of a global pandemic!_ ([**Help elect a senator who'll fight for our health care.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10"))

We've had enough. Sen. Cornyn keeps failing Texans -- and it's time to replace him with leadership we can depend on. [**Donate TODAY to help MJ defeat him this November, and your contribution will be MATCHED to DOUBLE your impact.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10")
\--Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489003c/7f51f7bc/4e29f3f2/4ef6987a/1717178735/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.1nd__1482__&amount=10")**

SL: Help Ashley Hinson flip the House
Sender: Senator Joni Ernst
Sent: Fri May 29, 2020 at 6:00 PM
Friend,
First off, I want you to know what an honor it is to represent you in the United States Senate. I'm proud to go to work and fight for Iowans every single day. The COVID-19 pandemic has been incredibly challenging for Iowans, but I have faith that we will get through this together.
I am writing to you today to ask you to support Ashley Hinson for Congress in the First District. The last 16 months have made it abundantly clear that we need to flip the US House and take the Speaker's gavel from Nancy Pelosi. From impeaching President Trump, to delaying the USMCA for over a year, to passing a smorgasbord of far-left legislation, Pelosi and her House Democrats have stood against everything we stand for as conservatives and as Iowans. **Flipping the House back to Republican control starts with Iowa 's first district, and Ashley Hinson is the perfect candidate for the job**.
Ashley is a proven leader in her two terms in the Iowa House, with a consistent and conservative voting record. She's fought to cut taxes, balance the budget, and give our veterans the support they deserve. These are the commonsense policies we need in Washington, and Ashley's record shows she can get the job done.
With conservatives like Ashley Hinson in the House of Representatives, we can get back to implementing President Trump's conservative agenda. If you live in the first district, please vote for Ashley on June 2nd. If you live anywhere else in Iowa, you can support her fight to turn the House of Representatives red by [**donating today**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010Izj-tSVg_tRKtWI9d7NkGjHPN-6hN-sSKdiwvcIUjltQhVj6g3hMUGHTmPuA5v5y3-I-NCeH6CmsWuN6LjvkMfkraHh-7vYFqdU--bf2581tIh1Cl2BiHZjAl2l4-pBpT9Pv6zLtSKEWNO9u9_u1A3JV856QnkH1s-cNvvpLlsayVmPZ7RTYhxsPF8eps4adokiBdhD8BUdw9Xpt7WPUzH5IYllYN-zrL3sb3bJ6loWaKHQsC4zm24lEOqz6K3wzl7E6LqzQKZjOk13NOQXpH_i1jxOEOtaDO1EWqqV6eqoTaXANgTGkdAkBnD_WO5COmFnsC2UkjqUvbndsMBPYIlOa-S-wQ_rcOH6FbBCLCA7BDQ21Ps1E-zJ-odFW65OZHqNtXt31Mo=&c=UpQqR0cGqRP1F3RTagC0V6OdqjYra1QaVv8haAz07s5_p98k7KoDKA==&ch=_I_A4xIdoODpoGm1KbxM04dTHGeZwX4gaG7OSAIlf38m0cLDdY0X3g==).

body:

However, I just received an update on where we stand and I realized I needed to reach out to you immediately. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17690747/202911547/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjIzOGRkNC1hNmEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfwwd42TOFU77L_j0hBOQ4xXR75Cf5k_ms6yfGmYMjs=&emci=21238dd4-a6a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=22238dd4-a6a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Hey friend. Alex here -- Georgette's Deputy Campaign Manager.

We have a big fundraising deadline coming up on Sunday, so I wanted to give you a quick rundown on where things stand: **-** **Fundraising has ticked down** after moving our in-person fundraising events online.
**-** So we set a goal of **1,500 online donations** before Sunday to get back on track.
**-** We've made good progress since Georgette reached out, but we’re **still a bit short.** The good news is this month's goal is based on the number of people donating — not hitting a specific dollar amount. That’s because we need to send an important message about the strength of our grassroots movement in the face of our opponents' millions and super PAC support.

So with that, I must ask:

body:
_Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority.

Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide.

This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs **YOU** to help him in this fight. _

clean_body: Senator Todd Young is a fifth generation Hoosier whose commanding victory in 2016 led him to join the Senate Republican Majority. Todd brings years of leadership experience from his background as a US Naval Academy graduate and a Marine. Todd's commitment to protecting conservative values and policies includes his fight for fiscal responsibility and America-first Foreign Affairs legislation. As a leading conservative voice in Washington, Todd simply wants to make government work better for his fellow Hoosiers and Americans nationwide. This year, however, Todd's main priority is to defend Senate Republicans in battleground elections nationwide and he needs YOU to help him in this fight. Hey, Friend, I'm Nate, a Republican volunteer and I am reaching out to you today to extend an invitation to join our new ==. By contributing today to the ==, you're pledging your support today, along with a matching contribution on midnight May 31st. Growing our grassroots donor base is extremely important right now because Republicans like Senator Todd Young (R-IN) are battling in the trenches to defend President Trump's Senate Majority. Donate below to join our team, and ensure that we have the strongest support system when our deadlines come due! == == == == == == Your donation to the Republican Majority Protection Fund is a direct lifeline to Senate Conservatives like Todd during this critical end-of-month fundraising period. This one-time, recurring donation will be a SIGNIFICANT driver for us to reach our May Fundraising Goal and solidify Todd's grassroots mission of aiding fellow Senate Republicans in this year's battleground races, like Colorado, North Carolina, and Iowa. So please, step up and do your part to defend Conservative values and policies in the Senate: == Thanks for your support, Friend. We're looking forward to having you on the team! name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: Brigadier General Andrew Salas (Ret.) Endorses Claire Chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DATE: May 30, 2020 CONTACT: Mike Berg PHONE: (614) 678-1909 EMAIL: [mike@clairechase.org](mailto:mike@clairechase.org)
---
| Brigadier General Andrew Salas (Ret.) Endorses Claire Chase
ROSWELL, NM - Today Brigadier General Andrew Salas (Ret.) joined the Veterans for Claire Coalition and threw his full endorsement behind Claire Chase in the race for New Mexico's Second Congressional District. General Salas most recently served as adjutant general of the New Mexico National Guard.
Brigadier General Andrew Salas (Ret.) said, "I strongly endorse Claire Chase. Claire is a third-generation military family member who will champion a strong military, defend our Constitution, and promote our core values in the halls of Congress."
Claire Chase said, "I'm incredibly honored to have General Salas' endorsement. He is a patriot who has dedicated his life to serving our country and I'll do my best to make him proud in the halls of Congress."
Claire Chase is a third-generation military family member and a graduate of the New Mexico Military Institute. Her grandfather Col. James Manatt was Commander, Holloman AFB, her father James Manatt, Jr was a Vietnam era Military Intelligence officer and her brothers, Ben and Robert, are combat Veterans. Since its recent launch over 60 Veterans have joined the Veterans for Claire coalition.
To join the Veterans for Claire coalition click [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001uFAxCSWjSTrpmJfzJjq6-SJspcuYl0AdfxXhsXE49rRD41fDLDnl9HbNgosq4P8KDD3-8jjDXDg9A0nPACo8ZDcLcioVpanQnrzLtQcF8zFX-zUt62AaDLDSRUjToLzhjDrdbl-LXEDjM7Ge42RvS44S61LoVVArVSGwDndj82s=&c=siMPnwba_VsE7ByLNXByyaqGvE1kinEyEYY3AV6AlZw5MOXH_8HGGQ==&ch=VbtC70n0jkOdIG_UNSExNZnn2DXw1-GQF7A4pCbU1EL3ihM1ngoF8A==).

| | Friends, You've been with me every step of the way, and I can't thank you enough for your continued support. My team has been emailing you a lot over the last few days about our FINAL end-of-month goal before our primary. **I wish we didn 't have to send these emails -- but the truth is, we rely on our online grassroots supporters to fuel this campaign. With every passing day, this campaign for NY-24 is getting more competitive. Outside groups are putting major money behind TV buys.
**While we 'll never be able to compete with them, we have something far more powerful: YOU!**
The grassroots supporters behind our campaign are truly incredible -- and are the lifeblood of our campaign. That's why I know I can count on you again.
[**Click here to make a donation to our campaign today, and let 's flip one of the last districts Hillary Clinton won in 2016 that is still supported by a Trump-supporting Republican!**](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b468/388db0e9/8c28201/609b8caa/950548525/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJjb25fbW9udGhseV9tYXkiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiQ09OX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDUzMF9FT001X1UxX1gxIn0%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/con_monthly_may?refcode=CON_EM_FR_200530_EOM5_U1_X1&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+Click+here+to+make+a+donation+to+our+cam&utm_campaign=CON_EM_FR_200530_EOM5_U1_X1&source=CON_EM_FR_200530_EOM5_U1_X1")

Francis Conole

body:
When Barbara wins this race, she’ll make history as the first woman physician in the U.S. Senate. And as a family doctor myself, I understand the need for public servants like Barbara who prioritize facts and science. During a crisis like this one, we need leadership, not politics.

|
---

| | Team, To say that I am proud of my wife Barbara would be an understatement. In just a short time, she has built an incredible campaign that is already making waves. She’s neck-and-neck with the GOP in the polls and political experts are saying that this race is in play. And I know that with the strength of this grassroots team behind her, she is in a better position than ever to flip this Senate seat in November and be a voice of reason for Kansas families. [**If you’re in this fight, pitch in $5 to stand with Barbara before the May deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17691075/202918298/-1877084089?refcode=em200529pm-i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWYyMTg4MS1hOWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HthU1s0j2u_1VoL3DJ_S9M5OkQTopIQGk3Em2d6tsyo=) When Barbara wins this race, she’ll make history as the first woman physician in the U.S. Senate.
