subject: Another endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
This is the third primary endorsement by a known conservative organization where Jake has been endorsed over his incumbent opponent, | | | |
---
| | | Friend,

We hope you have already seen this incredible news! Family Policy Alliance of Kansas has endorsed Jake LaTurner as their candidate of choice for the Kansas 2nd congressional district. This is the third primary endorsement by a known conservative organization where Jake has been endorsed over his incumbent opponent, Congressman Steve Watkins.

Here is why an endorsement from Family Policy Alliance is important. This is an organization who makes it their mission to protect and defend the things that matter most including our families, the right to life, and our freedom to worship. These values are under constant attack and Jake LaTurner won't stand for it. He has a solid track record of fighting and winning on these issues, and he will continue to do so as our next congressman.

Here's what Family Policy Alliance had to say about Jake:
---
|
---
| Jake's endorsement is the first Family Policy Alliance of Kansas has made for the 2020 election cycle. Jake has spent many years leading on pro-family and pro-life issues including passing legislation that ensured parents had the right to decide on their children's medial care as well working to pass an expansion of the women’s right to know law which ensures that women have access to information about the risks associated with and alternatives to abortion.

We need a congressman from Kansas who will absolutely lead on these issues at the federal level, and Jake LaTurner is the one for the job. You can help us get Jake to Washington, D.C. as our next Republican congressman by making a donation to the campaign [here](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d39c385adf&e=1050d051da).

Thank you so much for your generous support. It is so important that we have leaders working for us who truly represent our Kansas values!
---

| We appreciate your support!

Team LaTurner

clean_body: This is the third primary endorsement by a known conservative organization where Jake has been endorsed over his incumbent opponent, | | | | | | | Friend, We hope you have already seen this incredible news! Family Policy Alliance of Kansas has endorsed Jake LaTurner as their candidate of choice for the Kansas 2nd congressional district. This is the third primary endorsement by a known conservative organization where Jake has been endorsed over his incumbent opponent, Congressman Steve Watkins. Here is why an endorsement from Family Policy Alliance is important. This is an organization who makes it their mission to protect and defend the things that matter most including our families, the right to life, and our freedom to worship. These values are under constant attack and Jake LaTurner won't stand for it. He has a solid track record of fighting and winning on these issues, and he will continue to do so as our next congressman. Here's what Family Policy Alliance had to say about Jake: | | Jake's endorsement is the first Family Policy Alliance of Kansas has made for the 2020 election cycle. Jake has spent many years leading on pro-family and pro-life issues including passing legislation that ensured parents had the right to decide on their children's medial care as well working to pass an expansion of the women’s right to know law which ensures that women have access to information about the risks associated with and alternatives to abortion. We need a congressman from Kansas who will absolutely lead on these issues at the federal level, and Jake LaTurner is the one for the job. You can help us get Jake to Washington, D.C. as our next Republican congressman by making a donation to the campaign . Thank you so much for your generous support. It is so important that we have leaders working for us who truly represent our Kansas values! | "Donate to Help Send a Conservative Fighter to DC" | We appreciate your support! name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Trump Pulls U.S. Out of World Health Organization, Slaps Penalties on China Over Hong Kong Action | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5274742cd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Trump Pulls U.S. Out of World Health Organization, Slaps Penalties on China Over Hong Kong Action**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28be1a69da&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
“President Trump announced Friday the U.S. is terminating its relationship with the World Health Organization over its handling of the coronavirus crisis,” Tom Howell Jr. and Dave Boyer report. The President also took action on China for misleading the world about the virus, as well as for its security crackdown on Hong Kong.

🎬 **President Trump:** [“Cover-up of the Wuhan virus allowed the disease to spread”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=10dbd6b02a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Coronavirus Task Force Chief Mike Pence: You Did It, America**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=16eb12ae31&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
Early on, experts warned President Trump that without social distancing, the COVID-19 death toll could reach as high as 2.2 million. But with it, the range would drop to 100,000 to 240,000. “Today, as many states begin to ease rules near the Memorial Day holiday week turning point that [Vice President Mike Pence] predicted, the death toll, tragic as it is, stands at the lowest level on that chart,” Paul Bedard writes.

**VP Pence:** [167,000% surge in tests, 663M masks, and 110,000 ventilators ‘ready this fall’](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9954030093&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Ivanka Trump Helps Treasury Prioritize $10B Funding for Minority-Owned Small Businesses**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=aceef22603&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
“Ivanka Trump, senior adviser to President Trump, is working closely with the Treasury Department and Small Business Administration to help allocate $10 billion in funding for minority-owned small businesses affected by the coronavirus pandemic,” Audrey Conklin writes.
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s Social Media Executive Order is Justified – Protects Free Speech, Combats Censorship**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=85450fe345&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump was right and justified Thursday to sign an executive order calling for new regulations to strip legal liability protections from social media companies that censor posts and engage in political conduct on their sites,” Jim Hanson writes.

🎬 **FCC Commissioner:** [Move shines a light on companies taking political sides](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1770aa55b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**It’s Time To Stop Pretending Twitter Is Neutral**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=654ab7e631&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“By stepping in to flag Trump’s tweet with a warning label and a link so users can ‘get the facts’ about mail-in ballots (which ironically links to a CNN article by Chris Cillizza), Twitter abandoned any claim it had to being a neutral facilitator,” John Daniel Davidson writes.

**MORE:** [“33 Examples of Twitter’s Anti-Conservative Bias”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b367427425&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=32d96384d6&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=71187ad269&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7bc5660ae0)

body:
I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign from the past week Friend, a LOT happened this week, but I’m here to catch you up on all the headlines that are turning the race for NY-22 on its head...
_**Yesterday, we called on Governor Cuomo to reopen NY and because of OUR voice, he was forced to listen!**_ | |
---
**MUST-READ STORY FROM THIS WEEK **

**Led the Charge to Successfully Reopen Upstate NY!**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOs_G8SM9e2whEwLshKicHpY4VFs856aJYisryu9D2uh6kJw7IyynOgheegAvZ3JzBMle9Q5HmNTJUQ5vSpfaqBKQs-i0ohN76wg2Dh56bJOtfre4_5TSWOqXANoeTv98UzMpGTScBzj3-X9U_CKlS93Ex5qOZV1BKaq5fSpEAoUrSzw49wTHRCnfCBAFoGDNzNPCpg03NZjP82bPDIW34JbNji0vsu3-igP3O28_GE-tRXx6hUrELTa16pUlBmde5ihRFsZJj8GJ7l08KBlnwIzt5iUDYQ0bqKh8zxVxuID6jNN8ee6i-GHlkuEFupjM0P7mPBZEwQagtAFbPJiAHLYv-4z7fqGWmY2j2nsoRQGomdTRCmoyf2edH-rkFAZPDuqdeNZ6UHk49hXB5afhByQ3Pdff79x8A4D--Yq64Zqg11wbo9AezXCQ39qNNUo0E%3D)
Upstate New York was given the green light to reopen...until Governor Cuomo changed the rules. It’s truly unfortunate that voters and businesses in NY-22 cannot depend on our leaders in Albany and in Washington to fight on our behalf right now. I’m running to change that, and in the meantime I’ll continue to do everything that I can to fill the leadership void being left by Brindisi.

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOs_G8SM9e2whEwLshKicHpY4VFs856aJYisryu9D2uh6kJw7IyynOgheegAvZ3JzBMle9Q5HmNTJUQ5vSpfaqBKQs-i0ohN76wg2Dh56bJOtfre4_5TSWOqXANoeTv98UzMpGTScBzj3-X9U_CKlS93Ex5qOZV1BKaq5fSpEAoUrSzw49wTHRCnfCBAFoGDNzNPCpg03NZjP82bPDIW34JbNji0vsu3-igP3O28_GE-j30teYwTBztM-kVOP9rqzZSNsUsKGSRcG3b4tv0Ax61dHyBZk5agYWWwKtcBskwylndvP4emg5BpWVTQJQ_BfF1y-R6hS4CKFQSUENETsOocy3zvQ_pVouRlBS5qd5NT475khk-XRZQ_0nnYvRZ1aoT7ryeBoD2SL3vSlUQv7a806jr_28ng3ng3hV5EghEc43iDV1pWeqwiajZEBs9jXM%3D)**

[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnroGRIp9hua0jsPl0XrSU_UNADYgfIOz7hU6o98HnM3ooc9JpAXBWMf8IBKtltzSZn6_J8DfHB0kgIpa1R1UGWBJDQXwOb-y5e9gGXrPWrWIguBVVQhFn8tUomjgWFWqSAphhHkKbycx4s85FLF28Xa3HEqOCe2eNBPewyV071X56ii50jve3Y1omUuukO5JVbNbV6cX9JOp2-giPZ1w8ZnT8o4h_kcGGHhUzt9oTmQ6N7gSg_lkIJkzhfr2iKL9jGE7UlcfGnGyKhXa2DA1Kvhs1elD8aufaODGP43iZIhg6arHqT40WTuIUjI9gNqgZQ8d-rps6HfmzEo1VMxNKDJGqClp54JyBdqkrggkmhzY3ObjNM3s8E-Y-fpWGJaLS5qYuuPbAiFyLH9RGIuyNCM5buCvpgDmZLunCuxppLSMUTiLaCr7CLUJEBExMWqcKtw%3D%3D)
Anthony Brindisi knows that he can’t win again in NY-22 with his terrible, swampy record – which explains why he’s been copying and pasting my best legislation and passing it off as his own since getting to Congress. See for yourself in my latest “Copycat” ad.

View and share the video **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnroGRIp9hua0jsPl0XrSU_UNADYgfIOz7hU6o98HnM3ooc9JpAXBWMf8IBKtltzSZn6_J8DfHB0kgIpa1R1UGWBJDQXwOb-y5e9gGXrPWrWIguBVVQhFn8tUomjgWFWqSAphhHkKbycx4s85FLF28Xa3HEqOCe2eNBPewyV071X56ii50jve3Y1omUuukO5JVbNbV6cX9JOp2-giPZ1w8ZnT8o4h_kcGGHhUzt9oTmQ6NZu3JgaYAIKYR6K635B7yG4ApbkN14TRXrrUSPtjMQ293O_F9Imc8AXzozRaFZnhwixIf002c4w49uBD6j8aaTK5YBKrK0Nzz25AQqqiSJXIJ8JuHIDccnQBwLvUCpOLKiqXGKl-Iut71AlqrBbsUdLI6JfY4jgU24jpaIRbEkrgNpbpG78Mt8eZ1x7AfYdDWyBKHwCDdfDt36VD5s5hucQ%3D%3D)**
|

**Sending a Message to Washington**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOs_G8SM9e2whEwLshKicHpCW1TI7tH2WV8Eg6xm8V8ZqNO79GCG2a-fElaxbPC_9U_uqziDpBkA9u-c1b0AxS8gTRBOrc-a4Vs6LFnY0s9zdbhReilFwBV_1czzDug0JCM11YwVHUAf6UAM73jlBc7q3hhGR-1NRvprYTV-36uYshoWqw_kL8673HTIi_fOEpPkg1AoHVfCOd9Yjl3e_rHWIKS4HTpNflTdq1V7PzznRdh3uygxT9Ram9yRGH9lA2ZVgwIc3-FpRPvA2n3KgysPNGdWoyPtt3aKf6eyDiqB46I0qM3F6CQtfvsJXpozN-zr1czQO6qVtA4H0n-t4aVMWx1CtrCTcIrmJ5PKObyxsD-Nhjzu_kpQzoOoHlJ6Dc_5Lj-5zb8CihprMMxXzJjb1gV4c1smmXJEx5qlAD-91hK3jigEXqWEI9GnUzvRMQ_QhLcl-CqBXDQl0536y-45a5AjBgGGQiIDO7wPd-84hmz1TCk_aXmrKI_myPP5po%3D)
I’m not going to wait until I’m in Washington to start making REAL changes for NY-22. That’s why this week I pledged to support the U.S. Term Limits Amendment to limit House members to 3 terms and Senators to 2 terms. Career politicians – your days in Washington are numbered!

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOs_G8SM9e2whEwLshKicHpCW1TI7tH2WV8Eg6xm8V8ZqNO79GCG2a-fElaxbPC_9U_uqziDpBkA9u-c1b0AxS8gTRBOrc-a4Vs6LFnY0s9zdbhReilFwBV_1czzDug0JCM11YwVHUAf6UAM73jlBc7q3hhGR-1NRvprYTV-36uYshoWqw_kL8673HTIi_fOEpPkg1AoHVfCOd9Yjl3e_rHWIKS4HTpNflTdq1V7PzznRdh3uygxT9Ram9yRGH9lA2ZVgwIc3-FpRPvA2n3KgysPNGdWoyPtt3aKf6eyDiqBy9wj72Vmrn9ph9LwUJplboYny_9bBKgOPnzgHpTOyZs5YBtHZZxHjUXc0xBGV8mnZUT8ssAZ1OiY4fBQoxIObcKshllEWUQE_eOO8nx6vKGV2AZUvSYo5LbRr2vpFCwXTa7vMTRaPtI8gcDwUlIK9J15ZVKapCbBnCZ6srWAyiiQ0aB44A3AKxxAqNamooM3Wmbrj-ep9by-D3W4A5oxTo%3D)**

**I’m Officially a Young Gun – Thanks to Your Support!**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOkWIsfCayiamE2aCgfxatPMJaBXHbwzAnSUlzBLhP0EAVAXeaklnpjsq9sknHIrEilrgmwj01rx19ZzVJevYdon_t1QxoryLvn3bzCsUeJpMqWnEAJaXZlpW4KO_BzYRA29mSKhyPDSUknbY3UYzyjvhtmrQZ5xlW9cAfqxrp-ekGNTOY0i3OYxvHxOPHw-kz4prvU6YmegMch95SxGCoc4eN18cz6ypDUwywlcdMpE8NmEwJz6hsevnsDThkMK1MNURR5LPrtafyMmZOVhHJ58O74xnnmzjXS4wVog5KMkfhdHPa4X3CavfGsZCATGKqDgeQG3-40lFlOWF_TXr_NVCgOVThgaHrLA4wiKlay1wJ17eRvgffY9Ak0fAllw1HXKevANKSWPnNYTMK0U6FqugdxuNHVxKSZIthcT1oYrg%3D%3D)
This week, the National Republican Congressional Committee accepted me to their Young Guns program – a program which recognizes and supports the strongest campaigns in the top races throughout the country. This is a HUGE boost for our campaign – but our work is far from over.

View and share the post **[here.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOkWIsfCayiamE2aCgfxatPoYXbbwJp0IPfU5QHbcLWPFT-Tg_HBuJEXRVr2H_DOlpbA6aQNm5yyLhlIgEduxTmIdjtorOK2ze0Nrx-Y2krtdtCHWkY-SJUySZBcAHZljpQIxfpA85XKNUwq0xBSLkiWiqnxRvolUxL9qzkjhg6cNxeULOfvooIM_HYFgMh0huoxbsREyS0goMUIG_1j-rd0gMNxxQxQ3HvcYd7R-jQZhzDs_d5zvLbrC4jvpE9dXN2U7mjYYYOR7P94u79MRCqJTiuY_jGcJM6w_54iHdDOw2VQlcJTQxo0THIpy9iVWCcpnF2fmAsKT1X-oFwjfNVIZyl8BS2w1K3QIn9BbaS-84EDGMC1kJJ8huirTiVv-Gr3ZCybPtErrhna-IE8mikHqWErAnKhX1qoenIyh-mTg%3D%3D)**

**Congratulations to Astronaut Douglas Hurley – A Local Hero!**
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=99b05331ec924778b76ab06956d670cc&_e=ywcKBoDFaBPEatDB5iMnrlcxbyXv9AKnS4iJLHcRLoOs_G8SM9e2whEwLshKicHpplltmybo6RkC4L0Hq681af3jI-DMCylj8aF_cdM64ydHhFDWqW89P_JV1kKSQSyr9o95y1-LQQEeS6DpmwDwP_F2hht4zLTEMniaDXHRn-3PrRRzaOIc9zJ28oquHK4IuV3EN1J6yybUoPlgQXL4rHgtuHPlC-I_KhNY4PskTrSe3jCt6wc3ZUZoI2CaCdoLdAp154hPfYRrEpFVUQMQGfcT1VHcxw-gHruYaqQcITFARFbapnR1H-RxMJGW2WQRsPPHLtX_6X90IjcPjUWAx-A_-Oji-thE5zmwm6N40LdP165dN3c3fiT1IosEecN8zFs5ixFIlgfzBq6rwsfTfVNEy9o6lwM6mP1bp1-AaPEgXoDRgq3PwR7z6a4UGstnYqTYgzLy_GTBwEmpwJIB5m6qB6T-iOBhVtAIkfMGam36IXOG11FIfA1VYqkURW4z)
Today the world will watch as Douglas Hurley – an Owego native – will make history when he blasts off from Cape Canaveral as part of the SpaceX-NASA launch. Douglas and fellow astronaut Bob Behnken will be the first astronauts launched into space from U.S. soil in nearly a decade. Good luck, Douglas!

clean_body: I wanted to fill you in on new developments with our campaign from the past week Friend, a LOT happened this week, but I’m here to catch you up on all the headlines that are turning the race for NY-22 on its head... Yesterday, we called on Governor Cuomo to reopen NY and because of OUR voice, he was forced to listen! | | MUST-READ STORY FROM THIS WEEK Led the Charge to Successfully Reopen Upstate NY! Upstate New York was given the green light to reopen...until Governor Cuomo changed the rules. It’s truly unfortunate that voters and businesses in NY-22 cannot depend on our leaders in Albany and in Washington to fight on our behalf right now. I’m running to change that, and in the meantime I’ll continue to do everything that I can to fill the leadership void being left by Brindisi. View and share the post | Brindisi is Great at One Thing: Copy and Paste Anthony Brindisi knows that he can’t win again in NY-22 with his terrible, swampy record – which explains why he’s been copying and pasting my best legislation and passing it off as his own since getting to Congress. See for yourself in my latest “Copycat” ad. View and share the video | Sending a Message to Washington I’m not going to wait until I’m in Washington to start making REAL changes for NY-22. That’s why this week I pledged to support the U.S. Term Limits Amendment to limit House members to 3 terms and Senators to 2 terms. Career politicians – your days in Washington are numbered! View and share the post | I’m Officially a Young Gun – Thanks to Your Support! This week, the National Republican Congressional Committee accepted me to their Young Guns program – a program which recognizes and supports the strongest campaigns in the top races throughout the country. This is a HUGE boost for our campaign – but our work is far from over. View and share the post | Congratulations to Astronaut Douglas Hurley – A Local Hero! Today the world will watch as Douglas Hurley – an Owego native – will make history when he blasts off from Cape Canaveral as part of the SpaceX-NASA launch. name: Team Stanton
subject: tomorrow >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Tomorrow is our campaign's important End of Month deadline. That means, including this deadline, we only have six more fundraising deadlines before November's election and we are running behind on our fundraising targets!

_That 's why we are reaching out to ask for your monthly support for the next six months._

[__](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pKuW82mUMFdMFxFL70Jesfv7sosG2J9TX6jFLWxDFk=/MhWM_bPt3iKT_qBmnNaBLzrqXEIBmlNrY0FtrmZBErE=?refcode=X_053020_EOM_C&amount=5&recurring=6)

**If you give just _$5 per month_ to Greg's campaign between now and election day, your monthly support will cover the costs of mailers, digital ads, and cellular charges to help our campaign drive at least five potential voters to the polls in November.**

[**Will you consider making a $5 monthly contribution to help us win big in November?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pKuW82mUMFdMFxFL70Jesfv7sosG2J9TX6jFLWxDFk=/MhWM_bPt3iKT_qBmnNaBLzrqXEIBmlNrY0FtrmZBErE=?refcode=X_053020_EOM_C&amount=5&recurring=6)

[****](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pKuW82mUMFdMFxFL70Jesfv7sosG2J9TX6jFLWxDFk=/MhWM_bPt3iKT_qBmnNaBLzrqXEIBmlNrY0FtrmZBErE=?refcode=X_053020_EOM_C)

Thank you for your enduring support!

\-- _Team Stanton_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

body:
It seems like yesterday that the Admiral announced his run for Senate. Now, we're just three days from primary Election Day. Whew!
|

| | [](secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_defensefund?refcode=FRA_20200530_em_fr_threedays_all_img) It seems like yesterday that the Admiral announced his run for Senate. Now, we're just three days from primary Election Day. Whew! Our campaign has you to thank for this success. Every time we needed your support, you were there. When the Admiral took the debate stage, you watched. And when outside groups tried to attack him for his military service, you pushed back. There's a reason we call ourselves The Franken Crew -- because we're all working together on a shared mission, to make Admiral Mike Franken the next Senator from Iowa. body:

| |
# Did You Catch Yesterday's Debate?
In the final debate of this primary, Troy and his industry insider competitors went head to head on Voices of Montana.

There were two takeaways:
1) Due to Troy's broad business background he is more qualified for this position than the insiders.
2) The insiders are more concerned with protecting their personal interests, their friends, and their families in the industry than they are about defending Montana families.
---
| [Listen to the Debate](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=db7229e474&e=a212bb87cc "Listen to the Debate")
---
| The debate made it clear that Troy was the only one with conservative credentials, the only candidate with plans for our Land Board, and the only person running to help Montanans--not running simply because he "loves insurance."

One opponent's entire platform for the Land Board is simply about "weeds" while the other is **not in favor of reducing regulations. **

Republicans around the state agree. We cannot have industry insiders take over our party and the Auditors office.

If you haven't, return your ballot today and say no to these industry insiders.

Please help elect the only Conservative and the only one with a plan. If you can, please donate today.
---

body:
I will get straight to the point. I'm getting attacked by Democrats, the media, and the murderous Chinese Communist Party. And it's painful.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42614253&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjg4NDI5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

I will get straight to the point.

I'm getting attacked by Democrats, the media, and the murderous Chinese Communist Party. And it's painful.

That's why I've told my team to set a high goal for our campaign so we know that whatever happens, we will be secure and can keep fighting for the American people.

I am asking for you to join the fight today. If Democrats flip just 4 Senate seats, they'll win the majority, and we can look forward to open borders, nationwide ballot harvesting, and mass amnesty for all illegals.

My colleagues and I are under attack, and **[your support for me allows me to fight for them to make sure that we HOLD THE SENATE.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2MTQyNTMS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2Mjg4NDI5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

_**I 'll be honest. I have INFURIATED the media, and frankly, I am proud of it. **_

**I won 't stop fighting for putting the American people first and ahead of political correctness. I will NEVER let liberal special interests and Democrats transform the United States into a socialist state. **

I hope I can count on you to stand with me in this fight and keep liberal extremists out of Congress.

body:
We're using every donation we receive today to make key investments that will help fight for needed relief during the pandemic crisis and elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot who'll continue | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852574f/45c30650/1c8908b1a/66e9d8a5/160946443/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Your donation would be incredibly impactful right now -- for a couple of reasons:
* Our next fundraising deadline is tomorrow -- your donation this month will help show our movement's continued strength on the next public fundraising report that becomes public at the end of the quarter.
* We're using every donation we receive today to make key investments that will help fight for needed relief during the pandemic crisis and elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot who will continue the fight for working families in 2021 and beyond.

Right now is "go time" for Warren Democrats. We're keeping track of how many grassroots donations we receive every single day this week to reach as many voters as possible -- through advertisements, online organizing trainings, and virtual town halls with Elizabeth and other Democrats.

That critical work is only possible with your support.

**We know not everyone is in a place to make a donation right now. And if you can 't, that's okay! [But if you are able to, please make a donation right now to help hit our May fundraising goal. Every contribution makes a difference.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852574f/45c30650/1c8908b1a/66e9d8a4/160946443/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjIwRl9FT01fR1JNX0NfMjAyMDA1MzBfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR20F_EOM_GRM_C_20200530_V1S2_P")**

body:
Having worked with Mondaire for 8 months now, it’s hard to believe we are just 25 days from Election Day. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsl6G-2BkFMqMEzc7xUFMo5te7kCEDsXxKdbmAhbZFsPSV3ylXBGseNS8-2BvOxe-2BltoXm5xl4hq909HxwiV9THmKhT49FXkxZWMnCtP-2FX7DEo-2BVj6GcnA5CDcmNZg-2Fk6KFOXneY2-2BQgzTaMWEU8upYGtdVxG9c0GcAGP9IUWr5kfBkNv-2BrCUlumUOuQ6D-2BavYy-2F3a4eFu0baaChck15tyvNh-2B5J76neJPQttET89Mr7XR3EmeScuRs8bn-2BSDdk9FUukigax8H6F2USiEAi0SoiJz5/5C7B) Friend, **** **** **** Having worked with Mondaire for 8 months now, it’s hard to believe we are just 25 days from Election Day. All the hard work we’ve done as a campaign, with the help of thousands of supporters and volunteers, comes down to these last few weeks. Here’s what I know:
We have not just the most volunteers of any campaign in this race, but also the best volunteers and the strongest organizing program NY-17 has ever seen.
We’ve run our campaign the way campaigns should be run. We aren’t self-funding millions of dollars (or any amount), and we haven’t taken money from corporate PACs or fossil fuel industry lobbyists, unlike our opponents.
We are running on a bold, progressive platform, focusing on issues like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and student debt forgiveness, that will deliver real results for millions of working people.
We know we’ve run the best campaign in this race. We know what we need to do to win. And we are so close to where we need to be, **_but we’re just not quite there yet_**. Right now, we are $11,175 away from our end-of-month fundraising goal. We can’t let our hard work from these last 8 months go to waste because we weren’t able to get the resources we needed. **_[Can we count on you to make a donation right now so we can win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsl6G-2BkFMqMEzc7xUFMo5te7kCEDsXxKdbmAhbZFsPSXUvWW1p3dfXnodMvOcQz9a5ak6W1qdcm5Mntou-2FT5erhz8cspA95BCLoHNggTqsaJy0BUwrYL63jYLriCOB0cANYA5gcN0-2BJOyfCA1H7DjuQsMk1XRK6k14ryLIEOPvd4zJMVbGksqar7RPGJapQmiFgam8-2F0YUz72sHlkSjRkt4f9k9RS4itAxzLrAurCxl3oq8gqcS0L0Qz-2FkrWqcEvvGDB8K8OA4OwabpwNEyVmP/fIy-)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsl6G-2BkFMqMEzc7xUFMo5te7kCEDsXxKdbmAhbZFsPSWp0q9ML5EUaFFO5E9GZxKTA1KA9P1cAXeqc4JGzuRBdVEPDCt1x66yH8vV6Rfw4OpWBvevfFFudcqr4ySZw1n03Ywq5KJUqnMBfLodqurJDmdd7Mak21I-2BH0P49l-2F1sWn4umqwmoi5XToaSZw2CYM-2FGxVIgmmYSbsJPeGdzvXgmX24DCLkaLR-2BQFAUAp1m-2BKFmgskN5eIEKv3qbHnao-2FhaJA531cvLnPp8x28SaooXn/wW4o)
I am so excited for these next few weeks. Every day I am energized by the incredible commitment I see from our volunteers, and it’s only getting stronger as we get closer to Election Day. This isn’t just a campaign, it’s a grassroots movement. **_[Please chip in today to help support us.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIsl6G-2BkFMqMEzc7xUFMo5te7kCEDsXxKdbmAhbZFsPSdtEc2S1mv9ZhskAEi9k9bubmwh6prbyAarw4gUQZax5-2BmihSdZDvnfI7rXlRGOeJDiFpySQAGuVqEah-2B-2FGgrYKs-2BoggLptnPU-2Bq2tWwaVX6OaNDyE9fFtNLBy8H9OIrVdrPq2CKlH5C-2BYGKX-2BV7ro4apBTPRY8UoXzABv05EKDVA0RECLqTZ2t6nxcj0Egqnuvd5gI2sIln0q9EwScJM-2FvD-2FXALUkiYDDx6KFxYHNA9/h5FW)_**
Best, Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager
[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h4/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8AsJlRvyv3gSneUqeLKLznBCoz42UjHRg-2F9mAL1dFJ3ZZLzZdRYOoh1hLqB5rZpfXyI4EkxoaQB080Jhl9QnHjnfe9T8DIxH8PIkL33ehvkta2MPH-2FTlfxsZW-2BQ48C9QwW4PFxNPhf0MH83en5KEry5KvzNBnZ1FNRHNWjkdRs4tRsoti8E56fBUQGQyH1p-2FOfOaY-2FOZR6LGqcv0B70GOm70swLc8jRP1md9bGgtb3PJ/d_aM) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h5/tX6tdXlLuYnKkE2jZWciQUs1NelnZQ77h2lAz4D56MKHwSUyZQWx7qVCjFcDqaloBuebbm3HJ0d-2B5-2FYxxdoKwVOBabDdnsV2tGcSjbvcxR3iGs-2FVigfjuW4-2BoeO2bq4jblW1m8clcCHKIIW946D97T8epVT0AVty5tM1-2Bvaj6jfJJvq09Ek1r-2FuPeZV-2Fprr-2FVZ8f9YX5g5Q7rjyeNcGzTONxqDacuePRCqo0KYLW6ao-3D/jf5V) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AgE/ni0YAA/t.327/ldO2Q9AZQrOu-O7WDxSBuQ/h6/UgaStWBIiLYn8eevue7q8FAhcGqAoYLOwsOn0RlPD886rRcJZIsaAG91B3gZr9Se0rl7E6sVthVxyzbEXp-2Fbn-2FhHir0O0SxILqgq5UTDTiOwN9khP7lVnMRY8rHf6luL9S0c4cGe0C3mM0Cl0ePHo0Qxk-2FAm8F8FPuNBY4F6sf8-2FDn1EB1eA9frNYd6-2FGcuHQY9d-2Bh36JTrYIp94rwK1wEzmQaCucGIqmaQw4ntqeBTXtyvv1NVDziRPghak7Fyv/G_iR)

Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b138/18e32a7f/4c4343a6/7b21bae3/2068451583/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-lujan_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b138/18e32a7f/4c4343a6/7b21bae0/2068451583/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b138/18e32a7f/4c4343a6/7b21bae1/2068451583/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b138/18e32a7f/4c4343a6/7b21baed/2068451583/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click the button below to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed. **[UNSUBSCRIBE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b138/18e32a7f/4c4343a6/7b21bae6/2068451583/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe")**

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17693158/203013767/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=&emci=4540d9f6-cba2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=195204e2-d5a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864)
Friend -- my opponent and the super PAC aligned with her campaign spent millions of dollars trying to defeat me in the March primary.

**In addition, a nameless super PAC (likely the same one aligned with my opponent) spent hundreds of thousands on illegal and unmarked mailers promoting a Republican candidate in our race. It was a shrewd attempt to manipulate the vote count and box me out of the General Election.**

We were outspent 4:1. But we outperformed expectations and made it to the General Election anyway. That's because supporters like you stood with us every step of the way:

**[Sunday marks our end-of-month fundraising deadline and we set a goal of generating 1,500 online donations to help us keep pace with our opponents’ spending. Can I count on you to contribute $3 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17693159/203013768/1147193815?refcode=em-200530-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=)**

**[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200530-2-all-a)**
**We're building an unprecedented coalition in CA-53.**

Labor unions, environmental groups, the California Democratic Party, local elected leaders, even leading Democrats like Senators Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are unifying behind our campaign.

The truth is, we’re never going to compete in the money chase with our self-funding opponent and her super PAC. I still have a good feeling that our grassroots momentum can overcome her millions, but that’s impossible unless we must meet our own internal goals:

**[I’m asking personally. Will you make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress? Help me send a message that we're ready to overcome the odds and advance real progressive change in CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17693160/203013769/1147193815?refcode=em-200530-2-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=)

**[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200530-2-all-a)****
Thank you -- from the bottom of my heart,

_Georgette Gómez_

** **

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17693161/203013770/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=&emci=4540d9f6-cba2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=195204e2-d5a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17693162/203013771/1147193815?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=). We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4540d9f6-cba2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/195204e2-d5a2-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTUyMDRlMi1kNWEyLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OSrDAFHG-_R510xIUIP2EdP0hvQDFSG9i4i4Oi33gec=&id=110960909). name: MJ Hegar HQ
subject: What happens after the runoff -- up to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
There are really two possibilities about what happens after the runoff, and they're both up to this team right now.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef69867/4053016896/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef69866/4053016896/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.2nd__1480__&amount=10")
---
Peter -- With a month and a half to go until the runoff, we're in crunch time. The way we see it, there are two possible outcomes after the runoff:

**Scenario 1** : Our superb grassroots team meets every single goal we give them, propelling MJ to victory in the runoff. We continue our momentum, meeting every hurdle Sen. Cornyn throws in our way, and this team flips not just Texas, but the US Senate along with it.

**Scenario 2** : We don't hit every goal before the runoff, leaving us without the momentum we need to take on Sen. Cornyn's corporate PACs and big money backers. Sen. Cornyn is able to withstand MJ's challenge and he keeps his seat in the Senate, continuing his assault on Medicare and the Affordable Care Act and refusing to take action on climate change or gun safety. **[(Donate to make sure this doesn't happen!)](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef69866/4053016896/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?refcode=email_20200530.2nd__1480__&amount=10")**

Look, Peter, we've got to push as hard as we possibly can to make sure it's scenario 1 that plays out -- we can't have another six years of Sen. Cornyn jeopardizing our health care, our economy, and our planet.

**Make a matched donation today to help this team meet its goals, win Texas, and flip the Senate this November!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef69865/4053016896/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-biggestdeadlineyet?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200530.2nd__1480__&amount=5")**

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef69858/4053016896/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0ODAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1480&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890038/7f51f7bc/4e2acc6b/4ef6985f/4053016896/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

clean_body: There are really two possibilities about what happens after the runoff, and they're both up to this team right now. | "" | | | "" Peter -- With a month and a half to go until the runoff, we're in crunch time. The way we see it, there are two possible outcomes after the runoff: Scenario 1 : Our superb grassroots team meets every single goal we give them, propelling MJ to victory in the runoff. We continue our momentum, meeting every hurdle Sen. Cornyn throws in our way, and this team flips not just Texas, but the US Senate along with it. Scenario 2 : We don't hit every goal before the runoff, leaving us without the momentum we need to take on Sen. Cornyn's corporate PACs and big money backers. Sen. Cornyn is able to withstand MJ's challenge and he keeps his seat in the Senate, continuing his assault on Medicare and the Affordable Care Act and refusing to take action on climate change or gun safety. "" Look, Peter, we've got to push as hard as we possibly can to make sure it's scenario 1 that plays out -- we can't have another six years of Sen. Cornyn jeopardizing our health care, our economy, and our planet. Make a matched donation today to help this team meet its goals, win Texas, and flip the Senate this November! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- Team MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Can you chip in right now? You might get a call from Elizabeth to say thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Elizabeth is going to call a few grassroots donors who chip in before the fundraising deadline. But even if she doesn't get a chance to tell you this herself, Elizabeth would want you to know that she | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525748/45c30650/1c88417cc/66e9c425/1118061043/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
When she was running for president, one of Elizabeth's favorite things to do was calling grassroots donors.

She talked with teachers, nurses, bus operators, and anyone who chipped in -- even just $1 -- to help grow our grassroots movement.

She got to hear what was on their minds and what issues pulled them into this fight.

Plus, it's always nice to get a chance to say thank you.

So why stop now?

**[Elizabeth is going to call a few grassroots donors who chip in before tomorrow's fundraising deadline. If you can, donate $2 or any amount right now, and you might be on the phone with Elizabeth soon.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525748/45c30650/1c88417cc/66e9c424/1118061043/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjIxRl9FT01fRE9DX0NfMjAyMDA1MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR21F_EOM_DOC_C_20200530_V1S3_P")**

Even if she doesn't get a chance to tell you this herself, Elizabeth would want you to know that she's grateful for everything you do.

Side by side, we're going to root out corruption and put power in the hands of working people. But it's only possible if we stay in this fight.

**[If making a financial contribution makes sense for you right now, please chip in any amount to help hit our May fundraising goal, and keep your phone close-- because Elizabeth might call you to say thanks for being a part of this.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525748/45c30650/1c88417cc/66e9c424/1118061043/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLW1heTIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUjIxRl9FT01fRE9DX0NfMjAyMDA1MzBfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-may20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMR21F_EOM_DOC_C_20200530_V1S3_P")**

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: big news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
| | |
---
Friend,

I'm running against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) for U.S. Senate, and I need your help: While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who's cashing in on her public office and being accused of insider trading, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service. I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post _says winning this race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate. Right now, we're running neck-and-neck with our opponent - but while she's spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, at this critical moment, we're falling incredibly short of our May end-of-month goal.**
That's why this news is so amazing: **A group of fired-up donors has stepped up to match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only for the next 24 hours.[Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _twice_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e44b/288179be/b298743/348eaea1/3168983534/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk246-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
The fact that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red proves one thing, and one thing only: He's _terrified_ that his Senate majority is in _serious_ danger.
But here's the deal: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has outraised us by writing herself a staggering $10 million check - and you can bet there's plenty more where that came from.
In a race this close, falling short of our end-of-month goal isn't an option - and failing to take advantage of this rare match opportunity could mean handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we _have_ ****to win in Georgia.** So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you******to rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical match expires: **
**[Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $10)- before our crucial midnight deadline - to have every dollar DOUBLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e44b/288179be/b298743/348eaea1/3168983534/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjQ2LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk246-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock

name: Cory Booker
subject: Remember his name
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
George Floyd |
#
Earlier this week, a familiar tragedy happened in America. An unarmed Black man was killed by law enforcement. **His name was George Floyd and he was murdered on camera by police in Minneapolis.** In recent days, we've seen major protests in Minneapolis and across the country -- gatherings inspired by rightful outrage over the unconscionable circumstances surrounding George Floyd's death. It is heartbreaking that for so long there has been an utter lack of urgency to do something about the institutionalized racism that permeates our country. If we are to survive as a nation, we must change this gruesome reality. I've said often that if America hasn't broken your heart, you don't love her enough -- because there are deep injustices in our nation and it truly takes a love of country to point out those injustices and act to end them. Our anger must lead to meaningful action and real change. We cannot allow our inability to do everything about the problem of racism in America stop us from doing more than we are right now. If we are not changing, then nothing will change. We know that racism exists in our society. So, the real question we must ask ourselves is not 'are you or are you not a racist?' **It's 'are you or are you not doing something about it?'** As Angela Davis said, "In a racist society, it is not enough to be non-racist, we must be antiracist." In this moral moment, we all have a responsibility to be agents of justice actively confronting the truth within our society so we can begin a deeper healing. Let's get to work. Cory _P.S. I was on MSNBC with Chris Hayes last night to discuss George Floyd's murder and how we'll overcome systemic racism. You can watch**[here.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ecb/5fca0d19/7de528fa/291d727a/2994100339/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LtAED7-Ly1g&feature=youtu.be")**_

---
PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
---
Cory Booker for Senate
8 Lombardy St
PO Box 346
Newark, NJ 07102

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you'd like to update your contact information, you can do so **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0ecb/5fca0d19/7de528fa/291d7279/2994100339/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiY2FiLWVtLTIwMDUzMC1lb20tdDEifQ%3D%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cab-update-your-info?source=cab-em-200530-eom-t1-footer")**. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe)**.
---

I've said often that if America hasn't broken your heart, you don't love her enough -- because there are deep injustices in our nation and it truly takes a love of country to point out those injustices and act to end them. Our anger must lead to meaningful action and real change. We cannot allow our inability to do everything about the problem of racism in America stop us from doing more than we are right now. If we are not changing, then nothing will change. We know that racism exists in our society. So, the real question we must ask ourselves is not 'are you or are you not a racist?' It's 'are you or are you not doing something about it?' As Angela Davis said, "In a racist society, it is not enough to be non-racist, we must be antiracist." In this moral moment, we all have a responsibility to be agents of justice actively confronting the truth within our society so we can begin a deeper healing. Let's get to work. Cory P.S. I was on MSNBC with Chris Hayes last night to discuss George Floyd's murder and how we'll overcome systemic racism. You can watch "" PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE Cory Booker for Senate 8 Lombardy St PO Box 346 Newark, NJ 07102

body:
| []()

| | Peter --

Inside Elections just moved our race from Likely Democratic to Tilt Democratic -- a downgrade in terms of our chances to flip this seat in November.

That's why it's **SO important** that we meet our fundraising goal by tomorrow night. We have to ramp up our efforts even more than before.

**We've already seen Mike Garcia fall into lockstep with the Trump Republican Party. We can't let him hold onto the seat longer than a few months.** The good news is that we are still favored in the race.

**[But we need to raise $10,000 online by tomorrow night to have the resources to build our program for the summer. Pitch in $5 or more now to help get there>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e39/3920695433/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e3a/3920695433/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e3b/3920695433/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e36/3920695433/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e39/3920695433/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens")
Republican special interests pumped millions into this race for the special -- and it's only going to increase by the election this November.

It's my job to make sure we are ready to face that.

**We need your help to make sure we have the resources to run the strong campaign that can turn this seat back to blue.**

**[So rush a donation to our campaign to help meet our end-of-month fundraising goal. Chip in $5 or whatever you can today!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb88/29776869/9b61c42/569f3e39/3920695433/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MzBfZW9tMl9ub25vcGVucyJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy_eom?refcode=em20_200530_eom2_nonopens")**

Thanks for stepping up -- we need your help to make sure we meet this goal.

\-- Lexie

Lexie Kelly
Finance Director, Christy for Congress

Christy Smith is a community leader from CA-25 who has fought for her neighbors on the school board and in the California state legislature. Now she needs our help to defeat Mike Garcia and flip this battleground House seat blue in November. Help elect a champion for our health care, our schools, and our rights.
